title: Content Creator - Video Editor for YT Videos
description: My name is Doc William and I live in Honolulu, Hawai'i. Have recently started a YouTube channel in the "Business" niche. The name of the YT channel is "Business Execution Central." I am wanting high quality, professional 8:30 - 10:00 minute videos....and accompanying thumbnail....designed and created for this new YT channel. I will provide all the scripts….and you take it from there with your professional creativity and complete each video and send it to me for review….you would also create the thumbnail as well. You would be responsible for video creation, voiceover and revisions, if needed. I will have a Dropbox folder set up for you to upload all your work....so my team can carefully review in case there are any revisions required....which I hope would be at a minimum, please. All produced work needs to be at the highest possible professional level. No shortcuts. Nothing goofy on any level. Our YT audience will be brilliant professionals who are seeking advice and insight from a trusted source. That is us! We already have 20+ videos on our channel....and I can send you the link to our YT channel so you can see what we are doing. Some of the vids are ok....some better....and then there are some that are really strong....so those would be the standard we're aiming for.....and continue to get even better moving forward. Right now I have 5 video editors....but would be interested in hiring a few more part time. But....I need you to be very, very solid with your talent and skill. I'm definitely not looking for beginners who need lots of hand-holding or managing.....I need people who know their stuff....and can deliver at the highest level....immediately. It would be my honor to have you on our "Business Execution Central" Team. I look forward to hearing from you as soon as possible. You could be making money beginning today....as long as you can perform as a video editor professional with impressive creative and genius ability. Perhaps we start with a paid trial video? Mahalo nui loa....from Hawai'i.....

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant – Appointment Setting & Marketing Support
description:
Armadas Exterior LLC is seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant to support our inbound call handling, appointment scheduling, and marketing activities. We are an exterior remodeling company providing roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors, and solar services. The primary goal of this role is to ensure incoming leads are handled quickly and converted into scheduled appointments while also supporting ongoing marketing and outreach efforts.



Working Hours



Business operates on Pacific Standard Time (PST)



Phone coverage needed between 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST



Full-time position



Preferred schedule: Monday through Saturday



Some flexibility may be possible since we have in-office staff until 3:00 PM PST



Primary Responsibilities



Inbound Call Handling & Appointment Setting



Answer incoming calls forwarded from our business phone lines



Professionally communicate with potential customers



Schedule appointments for our sales team across two metro service locations



Accurately capture customer information and service requests



Lead Generation & Outreach



Assist with lead scraping and research to identify potential prospects



Support cold outreach or follow-up communication when necessary



Help generate additional appointment opportunities for the sales team



Marketing Support



Assist with social media posting



Track performance and return on investment (ROI) for marketing campaigns



Assist with
 marketing campaigns using a customer contact list of 4,000+ existing customers



Required Skills & Qualifications



Extremely fluent English (written and spoken)



Strong communication skills, particularly over the phone



Experience with appointment setting or call handling



Experience with lead scraping, prospecting, or list building



Familiarity with
 marketing and social media management



Strong organizational skills and attention to detail



Ability to work during Pacific Standard Time business hours



Preferred Experience



Previous experience working as a virtual assistant



Experience in lead generation, cold outreach, or sales support



Familiarity with CRM systems or marketing tools



About Our Company

Armadas Exterior LLC is a growing exterior remodeling company based in Oregon. Our services include roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors, and solar solutions. The virtual assistant will play an important role in helping us manage incoming leads, maintain consistent marketing efforts, and generate new appointments.

title: Video Editor (In House)
description:
Hello!

I run a Real Estate Media company in the United States. We are looking to bring our video editing in-house and add someone to our team.

There are many large editing companies, but they have big teams and different editors working on each project. Because of this, the quality and style can change every time. We want to work with one editor who can become part of our team and help us create a consistent style across all of our videos.

We specialize in high-end real estate video and are known as one of the highest quality media creators in our area. We are looking for someone who enjoys being creative, follows new trends in real estate video, and is comfortable giving suggestions. We also appreciate feedback about how we can improve on the filming side.

We see this as a team relationship, and we want the editor to feel like an important part of our crew.

Good communication is very important, so the ideal candidate should be comfortable communicating in English.



Editing Software:

Final Cut Pro is preferred, but not required.

DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere are also perfectly fine.

We also create talking-head style ads for real estate agents.

We are looking for someone familiar with:

Current real estate video editing trends

Color grading LOG footage (currently C-Log3)

Creative transitions and masking transitions

Higgsfield AI (mainly for AI virtual staging and day-to-night effects — not heavy VFX)

Basic sound design

Premium captions and masking

We are hoping to bring someone on soon, as our busy season is coming up.



Test Edit:

A test edit is required as part of the application.

Below is a link to the RAW footage from a recent shoot.

Please create a 30–45 second edit to show your style and creativity. You do not need to create a full video.

We want to see:

Your color grading

Your music choice

Your sound design

Your creativity with transitions and shots

Have fun with it!

Please
 a link to your completed test edit when submitting your application.



Video Instructions:



Property Address:

123 Main Street

Scranton, PA 18434



Editing style:

Cinematic look and feel

Color grading is very important

Deeper shadows are okay if it creates a moody cinematic look



Please include:

At least one day-to-night transition

At least one door opening transition

Use as many or as few clips as you want from the link below. The goal is simply to show your creativity and editing style.



RAW footage Link:

title: Experienced Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are a Transaction Coordinator Team in the Bay Area, CA. We are looking to add an additional EXPERIENCED Transaction Coordinator who's attention to detail and customer service are second to none! Our ideal candidate would thrive in a structured environment, have rapid problem solving ability and be highly responsive.



To be considered for the position, please make sure to send your resume and intro video or recording. Also, please note. You MUST HAVE RECENT TC EXPERIENCE PREFERABLY IN CALIFORNIA TO BE CONSIDERED. RATE TBD DEPENDING ON EXPERIENCE. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ANY TC EXPERIENCE. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE WORKING FOR MULTIPLE CLIENTS. WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO IS GOING TO BE PART OF OUR TEAM AND GROW WITH OUR TEAM. REFERENCES  WILL BE REQUIRED AND VERIFIED.



Primary Objectives:



Keep Agents and the team protected through compliance and document accuracy with a high level of detail.



Respond to all incoming client communications the same day within business hours



Audit all transaction files within required timelines with 100% touches up to date



Must have experience using KW Command, Skyslope, and other known RE Platforms. Must have experience using Glide, Open to close and MLS listings.



Manage the transaction process from contract to close.



Develop effective ways for better communication and increased customer satisfaction



Conflict resolution - think independently and be proactive. Get coaching from tea
mbers when stuck and do not give your agents the job back



Have RECENT Transaction Coordinator experience working with CA Agents, preferably in Norther California. Able to read and understand a CA Purchase Agreement.



Regular Work Activities



Managing all incoming calls & communications pertaining to transactions



CAR contract processing in Brokerage processing system, create timeline & document it in teams systems and perform signature audit



Communicate with clients, Agents, Lenders and Escrow throughout transaction regarding updates, timeline, initial deposit, signing and other account needs



Add fully executed Residential Purchase Contract to the brokerages system



Daily audit of files - reporting what was done





o Managing all pending contract files and ensuring proper touches/connection through file audit process. All files kept up to date and maintained with the highest level of customer service, communication, and expectations across all channels of the transaction. Co-op and agent spoken to twice a week, lender twice a week, title twice a week



Order Home Warranty, send Invoice to Escrow



Submit DA requests/Broker Demands. Verify with Agent(s) DA’s are correct prior to Close of Escrow submit to Escrow for disbursement.



The position will start part time for training purposes but will convert into full time.

We offer Holiday pay (10 days) after 90 day probationary period.

PTO after one year of Employment.

title: Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Location: Remote

Working Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (ET)



About This Role

We are a U.S.-based promotional products company with a structured, rule-based workflow.

Our daily operations involve handling
s, managing quotes, tracking orders, and maintaining clean systems.

This role is not creative and not a growth/leadership role. It is an execution role that requires accuracy, consistency, and strict rule-following.

If you enjoy working with clear SOPs, checklists, and structured processes, this role will be a great fit.

If you prefer flexibility, improvisation, or constantly changing rules, this role is not suitable.



Core Responsibilities (High-Level)

• Manage and organize daily operational tasks following established SOPs

• Review and prioritize
s from suppliers and clients

• Support quote and order processes with accurate data entry and tracking

• Prepare quotes by reviewing supplier pricing and calculating margins accurately

• Maintain clean, well-organized files and records

• Prepare clear, professional English drafts for internal and client communication

• Follow instructions precisely and ask clarification questions when needed

• Provide daily work summaries and status updates

(Detailed step-by-step training and SOPs are provided after onboarding.)



What We Value (Non-Negotiable)

1) Extreme Attention to Detail

• You naturally double-check your work before submitting

• Small inconsistencies immediately catch your attention

• You notice differences in product details, quantities, colors, and specifications

• Accuracy matters more to you than speed

This is important for promotional products where details such as product color, imprint color, quantity, and shipping timelines must be correct.



2) Strong Number Awareness

• You are comfortable working with numbers and spreadsheets

• You can quickly understand pricing, margins, and calculations

• You naturally double-check numbers before sending information

• You are confident using Excel or Google Sheets for calculations and tracking



3) Strong Rule-Following Ability

• You prefer clear instructions and SOPs

• You do not “improvise” when rules exist

• You are comfortable repeating structured tasks daily



4) Excellent Written English

• You can clearly rewrite supplier messages into professional client-facing English

• You understand tone, clarity, and business context



5) Fast Learner Within Structure

• You can learn SOPs quickly

• You apply instructions consistently once trained



6) Independent Problem Solver

• You actively try to understand systems instead of waiting for instructions

• When encountering a new situation, you attempt to analyze it before asking questions

• You are comfortable learning tools and processes on your own

• You look for solutions instead of waiting to be told every step



7) Reliability & Stability

• You are seeking a long-term, stable role

• You are comfortable with repetitive, structured work



What This Role Is NOT

• Not a creative or strategy role

• Not a sales or leadership role

• Not a flexible-hours or part-time role

This is a professional execution role within a defined system.



What You Do NOT Need

• Promotional products industry experience

• Advanced technical skills

All systems and workflows are trained internally.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

Only candidates who follow instructions exactly will be considered.

To confirm attention to detail, include the word “Precision” in the first line of your application.



Step 1 – Written Application

Please answer all of the following:

1. Introduce yourself in 5–7 sentences

2. Describe a role where accuracy and rule-following were critical

3. Rate your written English ability (1–10)

4. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time, Monday–Friday

5. How comfortable are you working with numbers and spreadsheets (Excel or Google Sheets)? Please provide an example.



Step 2 – English Voice or Video (1–2 minutes)

Please record a short English voice or video introduction including:

• Your name and background

• Why you consider yourself detail-oriented

• Why you are looking for a long-term, stable role



Step 3 – Required Subject Line

Subject:

VA – Detail-Oriented

Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.

title: Digital Marketing Lead
description:
Role Overview



Own the end-to-end marketing campaigns engine—strategy, creative requests, execution, measurement, and iteration—to generate quality discovery calls for Sales. You’ll lead a two-person pod, coordinate with the Design team for social/video/reels/landing assets, and ensure rigorous attribution and reporting via in-house platform.



What You’ll Do

Strategy & Planning



Design and manage multi-channel campaigns (LinkedIn outreach + ads,
 funnels & nurture, landing pages, partnerships)

Define ICPs, offers, messaging maps, and experiment/test hypotheses

Execution & Systems



Launch and oversee LinkedIn sequences and GoHighLevel automations

Maintain organized UTMs, campaign taxonomy & tracking

Ensure seamless lead handoff into our in-house app / CRM

Creative Collaboration



Lead creative briefs and SLAs with Design (social posts, reels, carousels, landing page blocks)

Review assets to ensure message-market fit, brand consistency, and compliance

Uphold our brand pillars, style, and voice

Proposals & Reporting



Create campaign proposals (goals, audience, offers, creative brief, budget)

Produce regular performance reports with insights and next-step recommendations

Optimization & Learning



Run A/B tests (hooks, offers, landing pages, sequences)

Capture learnings and build playbooks for continuous improvement

Cross-Team Collaboration



Work closely with Operations, Sales, and Client Success to ensure clean handoffs, data integrity, and feedback loops

Be a communicator of wins, challenges, and insights

Key Outcomes

A steady cadence of qualified discovery calls (SQLs) delivered to Sales.

Efficient CPSQL, healthy reply rates (LinkedIn/email), strong landing-page conversion, and clean campaign attribution.

Clear proposals before launch and clear reports after launch.



Qualifications

2+ years in B2B / SaaS / performance marketing roles

Direct experience managing LinkedIn outreach,
 funnels, landing pages, automation (GoHighLevel or similar)

Proven track record in multi-channel campaigns & attribution

Strong skills in brief-writing, creative review, and campaign processes

Analytical mindset + comfort with data, dashboards, UTM tracking

Excellent communication skills (English + Filipino)

Ability to collaborate across teams & fast-paced environment

Nice to Have

Fintech/payments or SaaS experience; familiarity with compliance-sensitive marketing.

Landing-page experimentation and funnel analytics depth.

What We Offer

Fully Work-from-Home Setup



Health & Security (HMO Coverage)



Work-Life Balance & Leave Privileges



Additional Benefits:



Saturday & Sunday Off: Reserved for rest and personal pursuits

PTO Conversion to Cash: Flexibility for when you need it most

13th Month Pay: way of expressing gratitude for your hard work on holiday season

title: Cold Calling & Outreach Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly confident Cold Calling & Outreach Specialist to join our growing team. 



Your primary responsibility will be making outbound calls to potential clients, introducing our company, and converting leads into real business opportunities.



You will work closely with our
 Outreach Specialist, who sends outreach
s and generates leads. Your role is to follow up by phone, build relationships, and turn those leads into quote requests and sales opportunities.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable speaking on the phone, highly organized, and experienced in cold calling.



Key Responsibilities

• Make outbound cold calls to potential clients (B2B)

• Follow up with leads generated from
 outreach campaigns

• Introduce our company and services professionally

• Quickly capture attention and identify client needs

• Convert conversations into quote requests or opportunities

• Maintain detailed records in our CRM system

• Organize follow-ups and track lead progress

• Work closely with our
 outreach tea
mber

• Provide regular updates on call results and opportunities



Requirements

We are looking for someone who:

• Has at least 2–3 years of cold calling or outbound sales experience

• Speaks excellent, clear, and confident English

• Is comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Has strong communication and persuasion skills

• Can quickly explain a company's value and capture attention

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Has experience using CRM systems (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

• Works well in a team environment

• Has experience with B2B outreach or lead generation



Daily Activity Expectations

• 80–100 outbound calls per day

• Tracking calls and notes in CRM

• Generating qualified leads and quote opportunities



Application Requirements

To apply for this position, please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A 60-second voice recording answering the following questions:

• Tell us about your cold calling experience

• How many outbound calls do you typically make per day?

• Describe a successful call where you converted a lead into an opportunity



Only applications with a voice recording will be considered.



Compensation:

$6.25 per hour + performance bonus based on orders generated.

title: HR INTERVIEWER (FULL-TIME, AUSTRALIAN CLIENT)
description:
MONTHLY SALARY

?25,000.00



EMPLOYMENT TYPE

Full-time



====================================



OPENING STATEMENT



An established Australian business is looking for a full-time Interviewer / Hiring Manager to conduct and manage initial interviews for our recruitment pipeline. You will help us identify high-quality candidates for our roles and keep our interview calendar productive. This is a long-term position for someone who is reliable, decisive and comfortable with repetitive interviewing. 



====================================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Stable, full-time work (40 hours per week) from Monday to Friday.

* Fixed working hours around midday to 8 p
lbourne time, with occasional flexibility for urgent hiring cycles.

* ?25,000.00 monthly salary.

* Comprehensive training, including examples of strong and weak interviews and shadowing our current interviewer.

* Opportunity to grow into broader hiring or pipeline strategy roles over time. 



====================================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Conduct multiple initial interviews each day, adapting your questions based on the candidate's responses.

* Reschedule missed interviews and follow up on candidates who do not attend.

* Track applicant numbers for each role, raise concerns when volume is low and stop interviewing once enough strong candidates are identified.

* Make clear pass or fail decisions and write short notes explaining your reasoning and highlighting strengths and risks.

* Work with the team to understand role priorities and focus your time on urgent positions. 



====================================



REQUIREMENTS



* Strong English communication skills, both spoken and written.

* Confident decision-making and comfort with repetitive interview work.

* Ability to think clearly, ask relevant questions and adapt in real time.

* High personal standards, proactive communication and willingness to flag issues early. 



====================================



NICE TO HAVE



* Previous experience interviewing or recruiting for execution-based roles.

* Experience working with Australian businesses.

* Familiarity with improving interview scripts or hiring systems. 



====================================



SCHEDULE



* Monday to Friday, roughly 12 pm - 8 p
lbourne time.

* Occasional adjustments may be needed to support urgent hiring requests.

title: Technical Project Coordinator
description:
Position: Technical Project Coordinator



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Job Type: Full-time



Work Schedule: 9:30 AM- 4:30 PM (PST)



Base Salary: PHP 55,000 - 68,000 per month



Role Overview:

Were looking for a Technical Project Coordinator to support our engineering and operations teams by keeping work organized, visible, and moving forward.



This role focuses on execution support and task hygiene — making sure requests are properly captured, tasks are clear and updated, follow-ups happen on time, and nothing falls through the cracks. Youll work closely with developers, project leads, and leadership (including Jhun) to help projects stay on track.



This is an excellent role for someone who is detail-oriented, proactive, and looking to grow into a technical project or operations role.



Key Responsibilities:



Tasks Management via ClickUp

- Create ClickUp tasks from Slack threads, requests, or discussions

- Ensure every task has the correct status, assignee, priority, due date, and acceptance notes

- Keep tasks updated as work progresses and close tasks properly when done

- Break down incoming requests into basic subtasks and checklists

- Flag unclear requirements, missing details, or open questions for review by the Technical Project Manager

- Help ensure tasks are actionable before work starts

- Follow up with task owners regularly to ensure progress

- Raise blockers early and escalate when tasks are stuck

- Ensure no task remains in In Progress without movement



Communication

- Post short, clear updates in Slack covering: whats done, whats next, and whats blocked

- Tag the right people to ensure visibility and quick responses

- Support smooth communication between teams



Documentation via Confluence

- Keep Confluence pages clean, accurate, and up to date

- Add links to relevant tasks, notes, screenshots, and decisions

- Help maintain organized documentation for ongoing work



Issue Intake & Routing

- Gather complete issue details, including: reproduction steps, sample request or payload, error messages, affected client or system, relevant logs or links.

- Route issues to the appropriate development team with clear context



Requirements:

- At least 2 years of experience in project coordination, operations, or a similar support role

- Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills

- Comfortable using ClickUp, Slack, and documentation tools

- Clear written and verbal communication skills

- Willingness to ask questions and flag unclear information

[ Ability to follow processes and execute consistently

- Comfortable working in a remote, fast-paced environment



Nice to Have:

- Exposure to technical teams, software projects, or APIs

- Experience working with startups or small, fast-moving teams.

- Experience supporting data-driven or infrastructure-heavy products.



Benefits & Perks:

Fully Remote Work – Work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection

Healthcare Coverage – We provide health benefits for you and your familys well-being

Leave Days, Vacation Time, and Paid Holidays – Recharge and take the time you need

Equipment Funds – Get support to set up or upgrade your home office

Profit Sharing – Monthly and annual bonuses tied to company performance

Long-Term Employment – We value tea
mbers who grow with us

Collaborative Team Culture – Work with a supportive and globally distributed team



About Us:

AutoScale Ventures is a technology-driven company with 50+ tea
mbers across the Philippines, Pakistan, India, the U.S., China, and Canada. We operate a group of businesses spanning tech, data services, infrastructure, and AI. Some of our main products and ventures include:



Vehicle data (

)

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Position Overview: 



The Graphic Designer (Virtual Assistant) plays a key role in supporting BAZIC PRODUCTS’ marketing initiatives through the creation of high-quality, original visual assets. This position is responsible for producing graphic materials that support product launches, brand awareness campaigns, sales enablement, and ongoing marketing needs.

This role focuses on design execution, consistency, and scalability, working closely with the Marketing Manager and marketing team to translate direction into effective visual outputs across digital, print, and physical touchpoints. This is a fully remote position.



Duties & Responsibilities



Marketing & Sales Asset Design



1. Design and produce new product sell sheets, line sheets, and sales collateral for B2B and B2C use.

2. Create visual assets for
 marketing campaigns, including headers, product callouts, and promotional graphics.

Develop and maintain brand assets such as icons, patterns, visual systems, and supporting graphics.

Design marketing collateral for tradeshows, events, and brand activations (banners, signage, flyers, one-pagers, etc.).



Digital & Social Media Graphics



1. Design original graphics for social media platforms, aligned with brand guidelines and campaign objectives.

2. Support awareness-first content initiatives through visually engaging static and motion-ready assets.

3. Adapt and resize designs across formats and platforms as needed.



Product, Merchandise & Brand Extensions



1. Design graphics for merchandise, promotional items, and branded giveaways.

2. Support packaging visuals, product labels, and supporting product graphics as needed.

3. Assist in the development and evolution of brand mascots, illustrations, and character-based assets.



Creative Execution & Design Systems



1. Translate creative direction and rough concepts into polished, production-ready designs.

2. Ensure visual consistency across all marketing touchpoints while allowing flexibility for campaign needs.

Organize and maintain design files, templates, and asset libraries for internal use.



Workflow, Tools & Optimization



1. Utilize Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) as primary design tools.

2. Collaborate with the marketing team using project management tools (e.g., Notion) to manage requests and timelines.

3. Maintain openness to AI-assisted design tools and workflows to improve efficiency, ideation, and iteration.

4. Explore new tools, techniques, and processes that support faster turnaround without sacrificing quality.



Collaboration & Support



1. Work closely with the Marketing Manager and marketing team to support ongoing campaigns and initiatives.

2. Incorporate feedback efficiently and iterate designs based on evolving needs.

3. Support additional design-related projects as assigned.



Skills & Qualifications



1. Proven experience as a Graphic Designer supporting marketing or brand teams.

2. Strong proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign.

3. Ability to produce original design work; not limited to templated or pre-built Canva layouts (Canva may be used for inspiration, not final execution).

4. Strong understanding of layout, typography, color, and visual hierarchy.

5. Comfortable working across digital, print, and physical merchandise formats.

6. Open-minded and adaptable to AI tools and emerging design workflows.

7. Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple design requests simultaneously.

8. Clear communication skills and ability to collaborate in a remote team environment.

9. Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently as a remote contributor.

title: Performance Marketing Manager (Google Ads + Meta Ads | E-commerce)
description:
Job Title



Performance Marketing Manager (Google Ads + Meta Ads | E-commerce)



About the Company



We are a U.S.-based e-commerce company specializing in plumbing and water filtration supplies. We sell through our own website and multiple online marketplaces and are continuing to expand our digital marketing efforts.



We are looking for a Performance Marketing Manager with a proven track record of managing and optimizing paid advertising campaigns while planning and executing marketing promotions that drive measurable revenue growth.



This is a data-driven, results-oriented role focused on measurable results such as ROAS, CPA, and conversion rate improvements.



Responsibilities



• Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns in Google Ads (Search, Shopping, and Performance Max)

• Manage and optimize Meta /
 advertising campaigns

• Conduct keyword research and improve campaign structure

• Monitor campaign performance and optimize bidding strategies

• Analyze campaign data using Google Analytics

• Develop and execute marketing campaigns and promotional schedules

• Coordinate with developers and designers to execute marketing campaigns, landing pages, and tracking implementation

• Work with our team to improve product pages and landing pages

• Track KPIs such as ROAS, CPA, and conversion rates

• Provide bi-weekly campaign performance reports and insights

• Identify new opportunities to scale profitable campaigns



Requirements



• Proven track record of scaling paid advertising campaigns while maintaining strong ROAS and cost efficiency

• Strong understanding of ROAS, CPA, and conversion optimization

• Experience working with e-commerce businesses selling physical goods

• Ability to analyze campaign data and improve performance

• Strong English communication skills

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Ability to work independently and recommend improvements



Preferred Experience



• Experience working with Shopify

• Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimization (CRO)

• Experience working with product-focused e-commerce brands



Working Schedule



Flexible schedule, but must maintain 2–3 hours of overlap with U.S. Pacific Time for communication and meetings.

The role will initially begin as part-time and may transition to full-time as responsibilities grow and performance meets expectations.



Compensation



Salary will depend on experience and skill level.

Performance bonuses may be provided based on campaign results.



Application Instructions (Important)



To be considered for this position, please include the following information in your application:



1. Describe two paid advertising campaigns you personally managed — one Google Ads campaign and one Meta/Facebook Ads campaign.

• Campaign objective (sales, lead generation, etc.)

• Type of campaign (Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Conversion Campaign, etc.)

• Target market or country

• Type of products/services advertised

2. What was the monthly ad budget for each campaign?

3. What were the key performance metrics before and after optimization, including ROAS, CPA, conversion rate, and CPC?

4. What specific optimizations or changes did you make to improve campaign performance?

(Examples: keyword restructuring, CRO, audience targeting, bid strategy changes, creative testing, landing page improvements, etc.) 

5. Which e-commerce platform was used (e.g., Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce)?

6. Provide a sample campaign performance report showing key performance indicators (KPIs) such as revenue generated, ad spend, ROAS, conversion rate, CPC, and CTR. Include a platform screenshot or dashboard that supports your results or claims (sensitive information may be hidden), and provide an accessible link to the report or dashboard (e.g., Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Google Analytics, or Looker Studio).



Applications without this information will not be considered.

title: wix website
description:
Wix Website Redesign Specialist for Luxury Skincare & Medical Aesthetics Brand (Oakville, Canada)



Salary: $6/hour

Project Timeline: 2 weeks

Website: 



About Us:

We are a high-end luxury clean skincare brand and medical aesthetics clinic based in Oakville, Ontario, Canada. Our target clients are women and men ages 35–60 who value premium skincare, holistic wellness, and safe medical aesthetic treatments. We offer a full range of clinical and holistic services, including MD- and NP-led procedures, advanced laser therapies, injectables, online consultations, and nutrition/ND support focusing on gut–skin health.



Project Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Wix designer/developer to redesign and upgrade our existing website. The new site must look elevated, luxurious, clean, and professional, while improving sales conversions and online booking.



Key Goals:

• 70% of website focus: Drive online sales of our 12 luxury skincare products

Responsibilities:

• Improve user flow for both product purchasing and appointment booking

• Integrate SEO best practices for Oakville, Ontario audience

• Connect all necessary apps, payment settings, booking tools, and automations



Requirements:

• Proven experience designing Wix websites (portfolio required)

• Strong understanding of luxury brand aesthetics

• Strong English communication skills

To Apply:

title: Real Estate Deal analyst / Underwriter (FIX & FLIP – U.S.)
description:
Location: Remote (Full-Time)

Compensation: $600–$1200/month + performance bonuses

Hours: 40 hours per week ( PST TimeZone )



About Us

We are a fast-growing real estate investment company focused on acquiring and flipping residential properties in Washington State ( Seattle market).



Our goal is to scale aggressively and build a high-performance acquisitions system analyzing 100+ deals per month.

We are not hiring a generic Virtual Assistant.

We are hiring a Deal Analyst who directly impacts company profitability.

Your Mission

Analyze 5–10 residential properties per day and determine:

After Repair Value (ARV)

Renovation estimate (using provided cost sheet)

Maximum Allowable Offer (MAO)

Projected net profit

Risk factors and red flags

Your job is to filter deals so leadership only reviews high-probability opportunities. Accuracy and speed are critical.



Responsibilities

Pull and analyze property comparables (MLS / Zillow / Redfin)

Apply strict comp selection rules

Estimate ARV conservatively

Use structured renovation cost sheet

Run deal through flip calculator

Identify risk factors (location, lot, layout, access, etc.)

Be advanced in Excel or Google Sheets

Understand financial math (margins, ROI, percentages)

Be extremely detail-oriented

Communicate clearly in English

Have reliable internet

Work during U.S. business hours (minimum 4-hour overlap)



Strongly preferred:

Real estate underwriting experience

Familiarity with U.S. residential properties

Experience analyzing fix & flip deals

Compensation

$600–$1200/month starting salary (based on experience)

bonus per closed deal

Performance-based raises after 3–6 months

Long-term growth opportunity as the company scales

Top performers will be promoted into senior analyst or acquisitions roles.



How to Apply

Your background

Why you are a strong fit

title: Lead Operations & Dispatch Coordinator (Remote, Philippines)
description:
Lead Operations & Dispatch Coordinator (Remote – Philippines, Full Time)



We’re **Site Masters**, a fast growing junk removal and light demolition company serving Tampa Bay, Florida.



We’re looking for a **Lead Operations & Dispatch Coordinator** who can own the day to day heartbeat of the business: phones, routing, tech schedules, basic numbers, and keeping everything moving without drama.



If you’re calm under pressure, excellent on the phone with Americans, and love turning chaos into clean, repeatable systems, this is for you.



IMPORTANT APPLICATION NOTICE

All communication regarding this position will be conducted only through Indeed messaging or
.

Applicants who call the business number regarding their application will be removed from the hiring process.



### What You’ll Be Responsible For



**1. Phones, Clients & Scheduling (40%)**



- Answer inbound calls (residential + commercial) with a friendly, confident tone.  

- Make outbound calls for estimate follow ups, missed calls, and invoice reminders.  

- Book jobs in our software, confirm details, and keep clients updated with ETAs.  

- Reschedule jobs and handle routing conflicts when trucks run behind or customers change plans.



**2. Dispatch, Routing & Tech Support (25%)**



- Build daily routes for 2–3 trucks so days are efficient and profitable.  

- Track where techs are, support them with info they need, and adjust routes on the fly.  

- Monitor tech time: clock ins, clock outs, and job duration for each crew.  

- Make sure Jobber is accurate and everything is closed out at the end of the day.



**3. Numbers, Tracking & Payroll Support (20%)**



- Maintain simple spreadsheets for:

  - **COGS / job level P&L** (disposal, labor hours, fuel, etc.).  

  - **Google Local Services (LSA) tracking**: leads, booked jobs, revenue per lead.  

- Prepare weekly payroll support: hours per tech, commission sheets, and adjustments.  

- Do light bookkeeping support in QuickBooks Online (training provided).



**4. Admin, SOPs & Executive Assistance (15%)**



- Update and refine SOPs as we improve systems.  

- Help with recurring admin tasks, online orders, and occasional personal assistant tasks.  

- Organize photos, Google Drive folders, and basic reports for leadership.  



You will work directly with the owner and existing VA to keep operations tight and improve the system over time.



### Requirements



- **Location:** Philippines (home based, quiet workspace).  

- **Experience:**  

  - 2+ years as a VA, dispatcher, scheduler, or operations coordinator for a **US based service company** (construction, cleaners, junk removal, home services, etc.).  

  - Strong **phone experience with US clients** (inbound + outbound).  

- **Skills:**  

  - Excellent spoken and written English.  

  - Confident on live calls; can handle upset customers without losing composure.  

  - Comfortable with CRMs / job management tools (Jobber a plus), Google Workspace, spreadsheets.  

  - Good with numbers and details (time tracking, simple P&L, invoices).  

  - Fast learner with solid computer skills (50+ WPM preferred).  

- **Technical Setup:**  

  - Reliable computer (i5/Ryzen 5 or better, 8GB+ RAM).  

  - Stable wired internet (at least 25 Mbps) + backup internet.  

  - Quality USB headset and quiet workspace.  

  - Willing to use **Hubstaff** for time tracking and screenshots.



### Schedule & Compensation



- **Hours:** 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST, Monday–Friday (with 30–60 min lunch).  

- **Sometimes:** 1–2 Saturday half days per month for peak periods (additional hourly pay)

- **Salary Range: **$1,300 – $1,500 USD/month, depending on experience and performance.  

- **Extras:**  

  - 1 paid day off per month after probation.  

  - Paid PH regular holidays after probation.  

  - Performance bonuses based on reliability, accuracy, and call handling.  

  - Long term, stable role with growth into senior operations if you perform.



### How To Apply



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



Please Answer ALL of the Following:

Expected Monthly Salary & Why

What is your expected monthly salary in USD, and why do you believe this reflects your skills and experience? Please share 1–2 specific examples of results or value you created for past employers.





US Phone Experience

How many years of phone work with US clients do you have (inbound and/or outbound)? Give 1–2 concrete examples of the types of calls you handled and your responsibilities on those calls.





English & Video Scenario



Rate your spoken English from 1–10.

Record a 2?minute Loom (or similar) video of yourself handling this scenario:



 A customer is angry because the truck is running 45 minutes late and is asking for a discount.

Share the video link.





Tech & Work Environment

Please provide:



Screenshot of your Speedtest.net internet speed.

Screenshot of your typing test (
 or 10fastfingers).

A clear photo of your workspace.

Description of your backup internet (e.g., mobile hotspot, provider) and backup power plan (e.g., generator, UPS).

Reliability & Work History



What is the longest time you have stayed in one role?

Why did you leave your last two positions?

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
About Adsplash



Adsplash is a performance-driven digital marketing agency focused on scaling e-commerce and DTC brands through paid social, creative testing, and data-led execution. We move fast, test aggressively, and obsess over numbers.



We’re looking for a sharp, reliable Virtual Assistant to support daily operations, reporting, research, and execution so the core team can focus on scaling accounts.



Role Overview



As a Virtual Assistant at Adsplash, you’ll work directly with the founder and media buyers to keep the agency running smoothly. This is not a “generic VA” role — you’ll be inside the engine of a fast-growing ads agency.



You must be organized, proactive, detail-obsessed, and comfortable with numbers and systems.



Key Responsibilities

1. Daily Admin & Operations



Organise inboxes, Slack messages, and task boards



Maintain SOPs, checklists, and internal documents



Manage calendars, calls, and reminders



File management (Google Drive, Notion, ClickUp, etc.)



2. Reporting & Data Support



Pull daily / weekly ad metrics (Meta, Google, TikTok)



Populate reporting sheets (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, spend)



Flag anomalies (spend spikes, performance drops)



Prepare clean summaries for media buyers



(You do NOT need to run ads — just understand the numbers)



3. Research & Creative Support



Competitor ad research (Meta Ad Library, TikTok Creative Center)



Save winning ads, hooks, angles, and creatives



Research products, offers, landing pages, and funnels



Organise UGC creators, briefs, and raw assets



4. Client & Account Support



Prepare onboarding documents



Update client dashboards



Handle basic client comms (status updates, scheduling)



Keep accounts organised and up to date



Required Skills



Excellent written English



Strong attention to detail (this is non-negotiable)



Comfortable with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)



Ability to follow SOPs and think independently



Fast learner with a growth mindset



Reliable internet & availability during agreed hours



Nice to Have (Big Plus)



Experience with digital marketing or ad agencies



Familiarity with Meta Ads terminology (CTR, CPM, CPA, ROAS)



Experience using Notion, ClickUp, Slack



Experience working with e-commerce brands



Creative eye (understands what makes ads convert)



Work Style & Expectations



Fully remote



Long-term role (not short-term gig work)



Clear tasks, clear KPIs, zero micromanagement



Performance-based growth opportunities inside Adsplash



What You’ll Get



Stable monthly pay



Work directly with a fast-scaling agency founder



Learn performance marketing from the inside



Opportunity to grow into operations, account management, or creative roles



How to Apply



Include:



Short intro about you

Any experience with agencies, ads, or e-commerce

Tools you’ve worked with

Why you’d be a good fit for Adsplash

title: Creative Strategist
description:
We're looking for a sharp, concept-driven Creative Strategist who understands what makes people stop scrolling—and buy.



You’ll lead the thinking behind UGC-style ad creatives (and more) for Meta platforms, working closely with editors, copywriters, and media buyers to create ads that actually convert. This is a hands-on creative strategy role where you'll guide ideas from concept to execution, not just sit back and watch.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Craft high-converting briefs based on market trends, performance data, and buyer psychology.

- Brainstorm, outline, and script ad concepts (especially UGC-style) that work with algorithms and against indifference.

- Work with our video editors and copywriters to make sure each creative hits hard from the first 3 seconds.

- Collaborate with the performance team to iterate, optimize, and double down on what’s working.

- Break down what didn’t work, and turn it into a lesson that fuels the next big winner.

- Help manage creative operations



Stay on top of what’s converting right now in the DR/UGC ad world - then beat it.



You’re A Fit If You:



- Have a track record of creating or guiding performance-based ads (bonus if you’ve worked with UGC creators or Meta platforms).

- Understand Direct Response at a gut level—what makes it work, and why most ads fail.

- Think in hooks, outcomes, and contrasts, not generic messaging.

- Can take raw ideas and turn them into clear, persuasive angles and ad scripts.

- Love data and know how to blend it with creative instincts.

- Communicate clearly, quickly, and don’t mind saying, “This won’t work—and here’s why.”



Bonus Points If You:



- Have experience writing short-form UGC scripts.

- Can edit in a pinch (not required—but helpful).

- Have worked in fast-paced environments and love moving quickly from idea to ad.



What You’ll Get:



- Regular training on direct response, creative testing frameworks, and ad strategy.

- Bonuses tied to creative performance.

- A chance to build a portfolio of ads that actually scale.



How to Apply:



1. Send your CV.

2. Share any relevant creative or strategy experience.

3. Include a portfolio of ads, hooks, scripts, or strategies you’ve worked on.

4. Write 3 core principles you believe make Direct Response Advertising work.

5. End your application with the number 11 to confirm you read this carefully.



Applications will be checked for AI generation. Please write it yourself.

title: Senior U.S. Mortgage Underwriter (Non-QM) – Remote***

As our organization continues to expand, we are seeking an experienced Senior Mortgage Underwriter with strong decision-making abilities, leadership potential, and advanced expertise in Non-QM loan products.

title: Virtual Assistant / Creative Coordinator
description:
Hybrid VA / Creative Coordinator 



Who We Are



Adsplash is a direct response ad creative agency. We've helped DTC brands generate over $500M in revenue — primarily through Meta ads. We write scripts, direct creators, produce UGC, and build the kind of ads that actually make people stop scrolling and buy something. We move fast. We have high standards. And we don't do corporate.



The Role



This isn't a "reply to
s and make spreadsheets" kind of job. You're the operational glue between our creative strategy and the outside world — creators, clients, contractors, and content.

Half of what you do keeps things moving. The other half keeps things from falling apart.



What You'll Actually Be Doing



Creator & Production



Finding and vetting UGC creators across TikTok, Instagram, and creator platforms (Billo, Minea, etc.)

Sending briefs to creators and following up until assets are delivered — on time, on spec

Reviewing creator submissions before they reach us (checking against the brief, flagging issues)

Building and maintaining a shortlist of go-to creators by niche, gender, age, and vibe



Contracts & Admin



Sending service agreements and creator contracts, chasing signatures

Tracking contract status, payment schedules, and deliverables

Keeping our client and creator records clean and updated



Research & Content



Sourcing trending content, competitor ads, and winning creatives from the wild (TikTok, Meta Ad Library, minea, etc.)

Pulling reference content when we're building new scripts or pitching new creative directions

Light research on brands, products, and avatars when needed



Coordination



Managing timelines across multiple brands and projects simultaneously

Being the point of contact for creators from brief handoff to final delivery

Keeping the founder (me) out of the operational weeds





You're the Right Person If...



You've worked in a creative agency, content production, or e-commerce brand environment before

You know what a UGC brief is — and you've probably written or sent one

You're obsessive about follow-up. Not once, not twice — until it's done

You can spot a good ad. You don't need to explain why it's good, but you can feel it

You communicate like a human being, not a corporate robot

You're calm under a lot of moving parts

You're based somewhere with solid internet and overlap with UAE working hours





You're Not the Right Person If...



You disappear when things get busy

You need hand-holding on every task

You've never worked with creators or influencers before

You treat deadlines as suggestions





Tools You'll Be Using

Notion, Google Drive, WhatsApp/Telegram (creator comms), Meta Ad Library, TikTok Creative Center, Billo or similar platforms, Docusign or similar (contracts). Bonus if you know Slack, Minea, or have used any project management tool.



The Details



Remote / Async-first, but responsive during UAE business hours

Part-time to start (10–20 hrs/week) with room to grow

Paid per project or retainer depending on fit

You'll work directly with the founder — no bureaucracy, no middlemen

title: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $1,100 USD/month

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand with a short-form video series already producing cinematic content on YouTube — mythology, history, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own the Instagram and TikTok side.



This is NOT repurposing YouTube content into different aspect ratios. This is building platform-native content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 20 seconds. You'll create original short-form edits and cinematic skits using AI-generated footage, voiceovers, and atmospheric visuals — designed from the ground up for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume.



The other half of this role: you'll be working with our AI-generated personas who serve as the visual anchor across our short-form content. You'll generate, composite, integrate, and stylize AI character visuals into edits that feel striking and intentional, not gimmicky. If the idea of building a visual identity around an AI persona excites you, keep reading!



---



THE STYLE



The content mix you'll produce:



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The kind of reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption because the vibe speaks for itself.



25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end, visually stunning executions of viral formats and dark humor. The premise can be slightly unhinged or ironic, but the visuals never break luxury. Think high-end perfume commercial meets TikTok audio trend. The Goddess is never the butt of the joke — she's the punchline, and she always wins.



10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. Visual overload with mythological texture. The algorithmic wildcard.



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Content that feels like a luxury car reel meets ancient mythology. Cinematic skits using our AI personas — high-production value, deadpan, surreal, or darkly ironic.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Slapstick comedy. Anything that looks like it was made in Canva. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Create & Adapt: Produce original Instagram/TikTok-native content using AI-generated visuals, trending audio, and our brand's mythology. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're not resizing — you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Cinematic Skits: Build short-form skits around our AI personas that use trending formats, dark humor, or deadpan irony — executed at a visual level that never drops below luxury. People share it for the joke, follow the page for the aesthetic.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated characters into edits as a visual anchor. She's not a narrator in your content — she's the presence. The face the eye locks onto while mythology and music layers move around her.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll create them. Using tools like Seedance 2.0 and Seedream, you'll generate goddess visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits. You're both the director and the editor.



Music-Sync Editing: Your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. You understand rhythm as a storytelling tool. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional.



Platform Instinct: You understand what Instagram rewards vs. what TikTok rewards. You know what gets saved on IG. You know what gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Instagram Packaging: Beyond the Reel itself — you contribute to grid cohesion, caption strategy, and Story sequencing. The profile should make someone think "I want to be part of this" within 2 seconds of landing.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, your turnaround per piece should be significantly faster than building from zero. We expect high output.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



After Effects (Mandatory). Compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is your primary tool. You build visual experiences, not just cuts.



Premiere Pro. For project handoffs and consistency with the rest of the team.



AI Generation Fluency. This is not optional. You'll be using frontier AI tools daily — not just editing AI output, but generating it. You'll learn to prompt, iterate, select, and refine AI-generated visuals as a core part of your production workflow. We provide paid accounts for all tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next). What we need is someone who treats these tools as creative instruments, not novelties.



The Aesthetic Eye. You instinctively know the difference between aspirational and try-hard. Between elegant and overproduced. Between powerful and loud. Your edits make people feel something before they consciously understand what they're looking at.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever. You understand pacing as a weapon. You know what "the drop" means and you know when NOT to use it.



Loop Thinking. You design edits that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice)



- Color grading — pushing AI output and mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Carousel / static design for Instagram companion posts

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates, and what drives them

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



WEEKLY OUTPUT



Ramp-up (first 2–3 weeks): 3–5 pieces as you learn the brand aesthetic, lock your AE templates, learn the AI generation tools, and calibrate with the team.



Steady state: 10–15 pieces per week across Instagram and TikTok — a mix of original productions and asset-based adaptations depending on the content calendar.



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production and visual effects — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run After Effects, Premiere Pro, and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a weekly paid trial. We provide real assets from our production pipeline, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content. Trial is compensated at $250 USD at the end of each week. If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, we transition to regular bi-weekly payments (before work).



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- An AI persona to build around — not a hypothetical, an active visual identity you'll shape and evolve

- A role that evolves as the tools evolve — this job will look different in six months, and that's the point

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon. A second AI-native brand is incubating behind it. You're not joining a finished machine. You're helping build one.



---



COMPENSATION



$1,100 USD/month. Paid trial at $250 USD/week, transitioning to bi-weekly payments of $550 (before work) after 30 days.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit you've made that is aspirational, aesthetic, or fashion-adjacent, or a skit that demonstrates platform-native virality instinct. Format doesn't matter. The feeling and execution does.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Creative Instinct Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch two reworks: (A) a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like; and (B) a 15-second cinematic skit that uses dark or deadpan humor without losing the luxury feel.



4. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). What is your experience level with generative AI tools? If none, say so — we'll evaluate the rest on its own merits.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established AE template — how long would a 15–20 second piece take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Ai UGC editor (major opportunity)

This is going to feel like a real human podcast and you need to make sure that there are no audio mistakes or visual mistakes. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.

- Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Reference video:
 

Google drive:

title: Appointment Setter – B2B Lead Follow-Up (Jewelry Industry)
description:
About Us



GemTek helps jewelry stores generate custom jewelry and engagement ring leads using online marketing.



Jewelry store owners request information through our ads and free training. Your job will be to contact those jewelers and schedule a consultation call with our founder.



These are warm leads, not cold calls.



?



Your Role



Your main job is to contact jewelry store owners who have already shown interest and schedule a call with our team.



You will:



• Call jewelry store owners who filled out our forms

• Send follow-up texts and
s

• Qualify interest and confirm they are a jewelry store

• Schedule appointments on our calendar

• Track conversations inside our CRM

• Follow up with leads that haven’t responded



Your goal is simple:



Turn interested jewelers into booked appointments.



?



What Your Day Looks Like



Each day you will:



• Call new leads within minutes of them coming in

• Follow up with older leads who haven’t responded

• Send SMS and
 follow-ups

• Schedule calls with interested jewelers

• Update notes in the CRM

• Track your appointments and conversations



Speed and consistent follow-up are very important.



?



Requirements



You must have:



• Excellent spoken English

• Clear phone communication

• Confidence speaking with business owners

• Appointment setting or sales experience

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace

• Ability to make many calls daily



Bonus if you have experience with:



• GoHighLevel

• CRM systems

• B2B sales

• Appointment setting



?



Compensation



Base salary: $750/month



+ Plus commission for each qualified appointment booked.



Top performers can earn significantly more through commission.



?



What Success Looks Like



A strong appointment setter should aim for:



• 3–6 booked appointments per week

• consistent daily follow-up

• fast response to new leads



?



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:



• Persistent

• Organized

• Competitive

• Confident on the phone

• Not afraid to talk to business owners



Most leads require multiple follow-ups, so persistence is extremely important.



?



To Apply



Please send:



1?? Your resume

2?? A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself

3?? Your experience with appointment setting or sales



Please put “GemTek Setter” in the subject line.



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Finance & Accounting Manager
description:
Remote – Philippines

Full-Time | Long-Term

Compensation: USD $22,000–$25,000 annually



We are seeking a strong Controller / Finance & Accounting Manager to oversee accounting operations, ensure financial reporting accuracy, and provide clear financial visibility to leadership.



This role is responsible for reviewing the work of the Bookkeeper, maintaining internal controls, leading cash flow planning, and strengthening reporting within our Shopify-based ecommerce environment.



This is a hands-on financial oversight role — but one that requires leadership maturity and strong technical capability.



KEY RESPONSILBILITIES:



Financial oversight & reporting:

 * Review and approve monthly close prepared by Bookkeeper

 * Ensure accuracy of financial statements and supporting schedules

 * Maintain integrity of the general ledger and chart of accounts

 * Enforce internal controls and separation of duties

 * Oversee the weekly P&L Forecast & Actuals Reporting



Cash flow & budget oversight:

 * Lead monthly cash flow forecasting

 * Monitor liquidity and runway

 * Support annual budgeting process

 * Provide variance analysis and reporting insights

 * Oversee the weekly cashflow forecasting and actuals reporting



Ecommerce financial analysis (Shopify):

 * Review reconciliation of Shopify revenue, refunds, fees, and payouts

 * Analyze gross margin trends and work with leadership to impact change when needed

 * Translate ecommerce metrics into financial impact

 * Identify sales, cost, and margin optimization opportunities



Process improvement & structure:

 * Strengthen accounting workflows and SOPs

 * Improve reporting clarity and timeliness

 * Support integration of new business lines into financial structure



What this role DOES NOT DO:

 * Daily transaction entry

 * Routine AP/AR processing

 * Payroll data entry

 * Bookkeeping execution



Qualifications:

 * 8 Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance

 * 5–8+ years progressive accounting experience

 * Strong QuickBooks expertise

 * Experience supervising accounting staff

 * Ecommerce accounting experience preferred

 * Strong analytical and communication skills



What success looks like:

 * Clean, timely monthly close

 * Accurate financial reporting

 * Clear cash flow visibility

 * Strengthened internal controls

 * Actionable financial insights for leadership

title: Real Estate Accounting Team Lead
description:
**Please read the entire job description & how to apply until the end!**

 

About KPI Advisors

KPI Advisors is a U.S.-based accounting and fractional CFO firm that works exclusively with real estate investors — flippers, landlords, wholesalers, and short-term rental operators. 

 

About the Role

We are looking for an experienced accountant who has worked directly with U.S. real estate investors. This is a senior role with client-facing and team leadership responsibilities. You will manage bookkeeping for a portfolio of real estate investor clients, review work from junior bookkeepers, and communicate directly with clients.

 

Requirements

Education & Credentials

- Graduate of BS Accountancy

- CPA license preferred but not required

- QuickBooks Online ProAdvisor certification required



Real Estate Experience — Required

- At least 1 year of bookkeeping or accounting experience working with U.S.-based real estate investors

- Must have experience with at least two of the following: fix-and-flip, buy-and-hold rentals, short-term rentals, wholesaling.

- Must understand flip job costing, rehab cost tracking, rental property schedules, CapEx vs. repair classification, 1099 filing for contractors, and loan refinance.



General Accounting Experience

- Minimum 5 years of U.S.-based bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Proficient in bank reconciliations, accounts payable/receivable, month-end close, and financial reporting

- Experience with catch-up and clean-up bookkeeping engagements

- Payroll experience a plus (Gusto or ADP)



Leadership & Communication

- 2+ years of team leadership or mentoring experience in a bookkeeping or accounting setting

- Strong English communication skills — written and spoken

- Comfortable communicating directly with U.S. clients with video on

 

Software & Tools

- QuickBooks Online (QBO)

- ClickUp & Notion

- Double Keeper or Xenett (practice management software)

- AppFolio, 
, Gusto, or ADP

 

What You'll Do

- Manage bookkeeping for a portfolio of real estate investor clients

- Perform and review bank reconciliations, month-end closes, and financial reports

- Handle or supervise catch-up and clean-up engagements

- Assist with 1099 filings, payroll entries, and vendor management

- Review and quality-check work from junior bookkeepers

- Maintain client workflows in ClickUp and document processes in Notion

- Communicate directly with clients to gather documents and explain financials

 

What We Offer

- Fully remote, work-from-home position

- 13th mo equivalent bonus & annual performance salary increase

- Competitive compensation based on experience

- Clear growth path to Director or Department Head

- Stable, long-term engagement with a growing firm

- Ongoing training in real estate accounting and AI tools

 

How to Apply (use 8 AP or more)

Please send your application with the following:

1. Updated resume or CV

2. New loom video describing your real estate accounting experience — what types of investors you worked with and what you handled (old video is not accepted)

3. DISC test screenshot

title: Virtual Administrator / Appointment Specialist
description:
Virtual Administrator & Appointment Specialist - Empower Lives Through Martial Arts! (Part-Time, Potential for Full-Time)



Do you have a passion for helping others achieve their goals? Are you a highly organized, proactive individual with excellent communication skills? Join our team and help us empower lives through martial arts!

We are seeking a dynamic and enthusiastic Virtual Assistant to support our two Premier Martial Arts locations. This is a fantastic opportunity for a motivated individual to grow with our company, starting part-time with the potential to transition to a full-time position. If you're a problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced environment and are excited about the positive impact of martial arts, we want to hear from you!



About Us:

At Premier Martial Arts, we're more than just a martial arts studio – we're a community dedicated to building confidence, discipline, and respect. We empower individuals of all ages to achieve their full potential through the transformative power of martial arts. We empower individuals of all ages, from toddlers to adults, to achieve their full potential through the transformative power of Martial Arts. Our experienced instructors provide personalized instruction in a supportive and challenging environment, fostering not only physical fitness but also mental strength and character development. We believe that martial arts is a journey of self-discovery, and we're committed to guiding our students every step of the way. We're proud to be a part of our local communities and to have a positive impact on the lives of our students.



About the Role:

As our Virtual Assistant, you will play a crucial role in the smooth operation of our studios and contribute directly to our growth. You will be responsible for a variety of tasks, including:



Appointment Setting: Managing class schedules, booking trial lessons, and handling appointment confirmations.



Sales Follow-Up: Following up with leads, nurturing potential students, and converting inquiries into memberships.



Outbound Sales Reach: Proactively reaching out to potential students through various channels (e.g.,
, social media, community outreach) to generate new leads.



General Customer Service: Providing exceptional customer service to current and prospective students, answering inquiries, and resolving issues promptly and professionally.

Benefits:

title: Remote Executive Assistant
description:
We are Harcourts Hoverd & Co, an elite and rapidly growing real estate company based in Auckland, New Zealand, and we are looking for a talented remote tea
mber from the Philippines to join our team. 



You will be supporting our Sales Manager and leadership team, while also helping manage phone enquiries and social media activity for the business. You will play an important part in helping our team stay organised, responsive, and connected with our clients. 



This is a long-term opportunity with genuine growth potential for the right person. We value reliability, initiative, and people who want to continuously improve and develop their skills. 



You will not be working alone. We already have an established Philippines-based team, so you will be joining a supportive structure where remote tea
mbers are valued, trusted, and fully integrated into the business. 



If you are someone who communicates confidently, takes ownership of your responsibilities, and wants to grow within a professional international company, we would love to hear from you. 



 



Your Role Will Include 



1. Personal Assistant to the Sales Manager 

• Managing calendars and scheduling appointments 

• Organising tasks and following up on priorities 

• Assisting with internal coordination and communication 



2. Reception / Phone Support 

• Answering inbound calls professionally 

• Handling enquiries from clients via phone and
 

• Providing a warm, confident, and professional first impression of our company 



3. Social Media Management 

• Assisting with social media posts and content scheduling 

• Supporting brand visibility across platforms 

• Coordinating content with the marketing team 





Requirements 



We are looking for someone who: 



• Has excellent spoken English and sounds natural and confident on the phone (native-level fluency required) 

• Has strong telephone etiquette and customer service skills 

• Is highly organised and proactive 

• Is comfortable handling multiple responsibilities 

• Has experience with social media management 

• Is reliable, professional, and detail-oriented 



Experience working with international teams or within the real estate industry is highly advantageous. 





Working Hours 



You must be available during New Zealand business hours. 



Shift (Philippines Time): 

• During NZ Daylight Saving (DST): 4:30 AM – 1:00 PM 

• Outside DST: 5:30 AM – 2:00 PM 



 



Compensation 



You are welcome to set the hourly rate you wish to receive. Please ensure your OnlineJobsPH profile rate is updated to reflect your current asking rate, as this will be the rate we review when assessing applications. 



Compensation will be based on your experience, skills, and the value you bring to the role. 



We are looking for someone who is interested in a long-term position with opportunities to grow within our company. 



 



IMPORTANT – Application Instructions 



To apply, please submit: 



- Your resume 

- A short video introduction (2–3 minutes) 



In your video, please specifically mention: 



• Harcourts Hoverd & Co 

• Why you want this role 



If you have received any awards, recognitions, or notable achievements in your previous roles, please mention them in your application. 



Applications without a video will not be considered. 



 



We look forward to meeting someone who wants to grow with our company and be part of a positive, high-performing team.

title: Sales Representative
description:
1. Make 50–100+ outbound calls per day to generate new leads (cold calling smoke shops, hemp retailers, wholesalers, vape shops, convenience stores, online sellers, and other B2B prospects).

2. Qualify leads quickly by understanding their needs, budget, and interest in THCA products.

3. Deliver compelling product pitches, overcome objections, and close deals to meet or exceed daily/weekly/monthly sales targets.

4. Follow up persistently via phone,
, text, and social media to nurture leads and drive repeat business.

5. Build and maintain a strong sales pipeline using our CRM system (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar).

6. Collaborate remotely with the team via Slack, Zoom, and shared tools to share best practices and report on progress.

Handle customer inquiries and provide excellent service to support retention and upsell opportunities.



Required Qualifications & Skills



1+ years of proven sales experience (outbound/cold calling preferred; experience in hemp, CBD, cannabis, tobacco, vape, or related industries is a big plus).

Strong phone presence: confident, persuasive, resilient, and comfortable handling rejection.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills for effective pitching and objection handling.

Self-motivated and disciplined — able to work independently from home without supervision.

Comfortable with technology: CRM software, dialers/auto-dialers, Google Workspace/Microsoft 365, Zoom, and basic sales tools.
