title: Meta ads specialist
description:
Meta Ads Media Buyer (Home Improvement Lead Generation) – Full Time Role 



*PLEASE READ EVERYTHING BEFORE APPLYING OR YOU WON'T BE CONSIDERED* 



About TR Digital : 



TR Digital is a performance-driven marketing agency specialising in lead generation for home improvement companies across the UK. We help businesses such as:



• Driveway & landscaping companies

• Kitchen & bathroom companies

• Garden room installers

• Roofing companies

• Builders and other home improvement specialists



generate consistent, high-quality leads using Meta advertising systems. Our focus is simple: build predictable lead generation systems that help our clients grow their businesses. Due to a consistent increase in demand and our plans to scale further, we are now looking for a skilled Meta Ads Media Buyer to join our team full time.



We are looking for someone who:



• Has at least 1 year experience running Meta ads for home improvement businesses

• Is highly confident running lead generation campaigns on Meta 
 & Instagram)

• Can show proof of results working with home improvement businesses

• Can confidently set up campaigns, audiences, creatives and lead forms

• Is comfortable tracking results and improving campaigns to hit KPIs

• Can provide weekly performance check-ins

• Is open to having a quick call every 2–4 weeks to review performance



We also want someone who can contribute strategically to the team:



• Someone who can suggest improvements to strategies to increase both lead quantity and lead quality

• Able to analyse campaign performance and bring new ideas to the table to strengthen our advertising strategy

• Someone proactive who is confident testing new approaches, audiences, creatives and funnels to improve results



Additional experience that would be beneficial:



• Experience using Go High Level (GHL)

• Experience setting up Meta pixels and tracking

• Familiarity with landing pages and funnel structures

• Ability to create simple ad creatives (graphics or short videos) when required



Most of the time, content will be provided, but occasionally we may require you to create graphics/videos or adjust angles on existing content.



Day to Day Responsibilities : 



You will be responsible for:



• When a new client joins - setting up Meta ad campaigns from scratch

• Testing different audiences and creatives

• Writing ad copy and lead form questions

• Creating and launching Meta lead generation campaigns

• Connecting lead forms to our CRM system (Go High Level)

• Monitoring ad performance daily and weekly

• Optimising campaigns to generate the highest number of quality leads possible



Additional responsibilities include:



• Weekly or monthly performance reporting for clients

• Bi-weekly to monthly call with our team to review account performance

• Occasionally creating graphics or simple video ads based on our winning strategy (training provided if needed)



Communication Expectations : Communication is extremely important for us.



We are looking for someone who is:



• Responsive and reliable

• Able to reply to messages within a few hours or the same day



If it regularly takes days to get a response, this role will not be a good fit.



What We Offer



• Full time role

• $5 per hour - After 3 months this will likely increase to $7-$8 if proven success 

• Long term position with a growing agency

• Opportunity to work with multiple high performing ad accounts

• Clear systems and proven ad strategies



How To Apply : 



If you are interested in this role, please send the following:



1?? Case studies of lead generation results (home improvement preferred)

2?? Examples of graphics or videos you have created for lead generation ads

3?? A short overview of your experience, including:



• Your experience running Meta ads

• Campaign strategies you have used

• Funnels you have built

• Whether you have used Go High Level before

• Results you have helped generate for businesses



Please send your application to:



????

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
Google Ads Virtual Assistant (Part-Time – 4 Hours/Day)



Location: Philippines

Type: Long-Term Part-Time



About the Role



I am looking for a detail-oriented Google Ads Virtual Assistant to help manage around 20 small Google Ads accounts.



These are smaller accounts that require daily monitoring, small optimisations, and ongoing maintenance rather than large campaign builds.



This role is ideal for someone who already has hands-on experience with Google Ads and enjoys managing multiple accounts efficiently.



The landing pages are in go high level so experience of this software is an advantage



Workload is approximately 4 hours per day.



Responsibilities



You will assist with:



• Monitoring Google Ads performance across multiple accounts

• Adjusting bids and budgets

• Reviewing search terms and adding negative keywords

• Pausing underperforming keywords or ads

• Fixing disapproved ads

• Making small optimisation improvements

• Keeping campaigns organised

• Reporting any major performance changes



Requirements



Please only apply if you:



• Have real experience managing Google Ads accounts 2 years+

• Understand keywords, match types, negative keywords, and bidding

• Are very detail-oriented

• Can manage multiple accounts without missing issues

• Have good written English

• Have a stable internet connection



Preferred (Bonus Skills)



• Google Ads certification

• Experience using Google Ads Editor

• Experience managing multiple client accounts



Work Schedule



• 4 hours per day

• Flexible hours, but must check accounts daily



IMPORTANT – How to Apply



To make sure you read the entire job description, please follow these steps exactly.



1?? Start your application with the phrase:

“Google Ads is all about the data.”



2?? Answer these 3 questions:



1. How many Google Ads accounts have you managed at the same time?



2. If a campaign suddenly spends double its normal daily budget, what are the first 3 things you check?



3. What is the difference between phrase match and exact match keywords?



3?? Include the word “Pineapple” somewhere in your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored.



Pay



Please include your expected hourly rate in USD.



This position can become long-term with increased hours for the right person.

title: Data Engineer (Cloud & GIS Focus)
description:
We’re looking for a hands-on Data Engineer who enjoys building things end-to-end — from designing data systems to deploying and running them in production.

If you like owning your work, solving real-world data problems, and building scalable systems in the cloud, this role is for you.

You’ll help us power analytics, AI, and GIS-driven products with reliable, production-grade data infrastructure.



What You’ll Do

Build & Own Data Systems

- Turn business requirements into scalable data solutions

- Design and build clean, maintainable data pipelines (ETL/ELT)

- Develop batch and streaming workflows

- Improve performance, reliability, and monitoring

- Deploy and maintain systems in production



Cloud & Infrastructure

- Work with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Firebase

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Set up CI/CD workflows with GitHub

- Ensure systems are scalable, reliable, and cost-efficient

- Implement logging, monitoring, and data quality checks



Data & Performance

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas and queries

- Implement validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI and GIS-based data workflows



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

- 2 years of experience in Data Engineering or similar role

- Strong PostgreSQL experience (schema design & performance tuning)

- Solid Python skills

- Experience with GCP

- Docker experience

- GitHub (including CI/CD workflows)

- Ability to independently deploy and maintain production systems



Nice to Have (Big Plus)

Experience with GIS / geospatial tools such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API



Experience working with spatial data or map-based analytics is a strong advantage.



Attach a PDF copy of your resume when you submit your application.

title: Freelance Video Editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) – Professional Campaign Projects
description:
We are a Sydney-based digital and creative agency producing professional video campaigns and branded content for businesses across Australia and internationally.



We are currently looking to recruit experienced freelance video editors who can assist with ongoing project work.



This role is focused on professional client deliverables, not casual social-media editing. The work involves editing high-quality video content for industries such as:



• construction & trade businesses

• real estate and property marketing

• automotive brands

• commercial campaigns

• corporate video content

• events and brand activations



Editors will be provided with:



• a detailed project brief

• raw footage and media assets

• style references and direction

• stock footage and music where required



Our goal is to build a small group of reliable editors that we can engage on an ongoing freelance basis when projects arise.



The level of complexity may vary between projects, but we are looking for editors who can consistently deliver polished and professional results aligned with the brief.



____________________



Software Requirements



Applicants must be confident using at least one of the following professional editing platforms:



• Adobe Premiere Pro

• Final Cut Pro

• DaVinci Resolve



Experience with Adobe After Effects for motion graphics, titles or compositing is a strong advantage.



____________________



What We Are Looking For



We are prioritising real work examples and portfolios over resumes.



Please apply only if you can demonstrate experience editing professional video projects such as:



• branded campaigns

• commercial advertising

• real estate marketing videos

• automotive content

• corporate brand videos

• event or activation highlight videos



Strong storytelling, pacing, colour consistency and clean finishing are important.



____________________



Technical Requirements



Applicants must have:



• strong written and spoken English

• a reliable computer capable of editing high-resolution video (4K or higher)

• stable high-speed internet connection for transferring large media files

• consistent access to electricity and internet during working hours

• ability to communicate clearly and meet agreed project timelines



We regularly transfer large project files, so stable infrastructure is essential.



____________________



To apply, please include:

 1. Links to 3–5 examples of your best video editing work

 2. The editing software you use (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci)

 3. Your computer specifications (CPU / RAM / GPU)

 4. Your internet speed

 5. Your general weekly availability



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



To confirm you have read this job description, please include the word CINEMA at the beginning of your application.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant (GoHighLevel & Systems Specialist)



**Company:** Social Hotspot

**Location:** Remote

**Position Type:** Full-Time (Long-Term)

**Salary:** $1,500 per month



---



# About Social Hotspot



Social Hotspot is a fast-growing digital marketing agency that helps home improvement companies across the UK generate appointments through
 and Instagram advertising.



Our team manages everything from lead generation to appointment booking systems, automation, and CRM infrastructure.



We are now looking for a **highly capable Virtual Assistant** who is technically skilled, proactive, and able to manage and troubleshoot our core systems.



This is a **full-time, long-term role** for someone who enjoys solving problems, improving systems, and working closely with a fast-growing team.



---



# Role Overview



Your primary responsibility will be **supporting the onboarding of new clients and managing the technical systems behind our marketing infrastructure.**



You will work closely with our Client Success Managers, Media Buyers, and SDR team to ensure our systems run smoothly and any technical issues are resolved quickly.



This role requires someone who is **extremely organised, technically confident, and able to troubleshoot problems independently.**



---



# Core Responsibilities



### Client Onboarding



* Set up new client accounts inside **GoHighLevel**

* Configure pipelines, workflows, and automations

* Connect calendars,
s, domains, and integrations

* Ensure all onboarding steps are completed correctly

* Work closely with the team to ensure clients are ready to launch campaigns



### System Management & Troubleshooting



* Troubleshoot issues within **GoHighLevel**

* Resolve technical problems involving **Appointwise and Hot Prospector**

* Diagnose and fix automation errors

* Debug integrations and system workflows

* Ensure CRM pipelines and automations are functioning correctly



### Communication & Team Support



* Communicate clearly with tea
mbers when issues arise

* Work collaboratively with Client Success Managers and Media Buyers

* Update internal documentation and systems when processes change

* Escalate problems when necessary while attempting solutions first



### Administrative & Technical Tasks



* Manage spreadsheets and internal documents

* Support process improvements and system optimisation

* Maintain organisation across client folders and internal systems



---



# Required Skills



### Technical Skills



* Strong experience with **GoHighLevel**

* Understanding of **CRM systems, pipelines, and automation workflows**

* Ability to **debug and troubleshoot technical issues**

* Strong skills with **Google Sheets / Excel**

* Comfortable working with **Google Docs and documentation systems**



### Design & Communication



* Ability to create **basic
 designs**

* Experience using **Figma**

* Excellent written communication in English

* Strong attention to detail



### Personal Qualities



* Fast learner who can quickly understand new software

* Strong **problem-solving mindset**

* Able to work independently without constant supervision

* Highly organised and reliable

* Comfortable working with a remote team



---



# Preferred (Nice to Have)



Experience with the following tools is a big plus:



* **Appointwise**

* **Hot Prospector**

* Marketing automation tools

* Agency workflows

* CRM integrations

* Zapier / automation tools



If you do not have experience with Appointwise or Hot Prospector, you must be **very fast at learning new systems.**



---



# What We’re Looking For



We are not looking for a basic VA.



We want someone who:



* Takes ownership of problems

* Solves issues without needing constant instruction

* Communicates clearly with the team

* Enjoys improving systems and processes



This role is ideal for someone who wants to **grow long-term inside a fast-moving agency environment.**



---



# Compensation



* **Full-time position**

* **$1,500 per month salary**

* **Long-term role with growth opportunities**



---



# How to Apply



To apply, please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with **GoHighLevel**

3. Any experience with **Appointwise or Hot Prospector**

4. Examples of **systems or automations you have built or managed**

title: Are you a gamer? This may be the perfect role for you.
description:
Running operations here is a lot like dominating in Mobile Legends or Dota 2. You’ll need fast decision-making, clear team communication, and the ability to adapt when things don’t go as planned. If you love teamwork and keeping things in order, this role could be a great fit for you.



Title: Operations Analyst



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Hours: Full-time (45+ hours per week), long-term

Days: 5 days a week, 8am to 6pm or similar, exact days of week TBD

Time-zone: U.S. Central Time (CST)

Pay: $1100 USD / month



Role:

- Ensure our stores have the right amount of inventory in stock by placing the right orders

- Communicate effectively with on-the-ground teams by both phone and text to coordinate activities and facilitate operations

- Troubleshoot problems as they arise in operational processes

- Ensure accurate tracking of team hours and activities

- Hold tea
mbers accountable for their responsibilities and performance

- Contribute to the overall mission of improving the company and enhancing operational smoothness



Requirements:

- A smile on your face daily - let’s have some fun!

- Extremely high attention to detail and organizational skills

- Strong mathematical capabilities

- Strong written and oral English skills

- A self-starter who can work independently

- Bachelor Degree or higher (summa, magna or cum laude and/or Academic Scholar from a reputable college is a plus!)

- Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

- Designated office space in your home



Why Join Us:

- Steady, Long-Term Work: Enjoy the stability of a company that values long-term relationships with its employees

- Great People: We hire people who are positive, smart, and get things done. Being around great people makes us all better every day

- Dynamic Work: Every day is a little bit different here. Be challenged and solve new problems regularly.

- Remote Work: 100% remote.



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do both of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3.  Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to support authors with their writing, publishing, and marketing tasks. This role requires a variety of skills, from research and content creation to marketing,
 automation, and administrative support. The ideal candidate should have a passion for books, be well-organized, and possess excellent communication skills.



Key Responsibilities:

Video Editing & TikTok Management: Edit engaging short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and other platforms. Manage posting schedules, develop content strategies, and help grow the author’s TikTok and overall social media presence.

Marketing: Create content, manage social media accounts, handle outreach and lead generation activities, and assist with
 marketing efforts (using tools like Klaviyo or ConvertKit). Set up and manage automations, workflows, and regular newsletters.

Content Creation: Conceptualize and produce videos aligned with current trends, especially within the publishing and literary community.



Qualifications:

Proficiency in video editing tools like CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Canva, etc.

Experience growing and managing TikTok or other short-form video platforms.

Experience with
 marketing platforms like Klaviyo, ConvertKit, or similar.

Ability to create
 automations, workflows, and basic newsletters.

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Passion for books, reading, and literary trends.

Background in customer service and excellent communication skills.

Availability during US business hours.

Familiarity with social media management and basic marketing analytics tools.

title: VA with Shopify or WordPress experience
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to support authors with their writing, publishing, and marketing tasks. This role requires a variety of skills, from research and content creation to marketing and administrative support. The ideal candidate should have a passion for books, be well-organized, and possess excellent communication skills.



Key Responsibilities:

Marketing: Create engaging content, manage social media accounts, handle outreach, and lead generation.

Website Management: Expertly update and maintain the author’s website using no-code/low-code platforms such as Wix, Shopify, and WordPress. Candidates should be capable of setting up landing pages and full websites from scratch.

Administrative Tasks: Manage
s, organize files, and handle calendar scheduling efficiently.

Requirements:



Proven experience in building and managing websites using platforms like Wix, Shopify, and WordPress.

Strong ability to perform tasks with attention to detail and proactive problem-solving skills.

Passion for reading and books.

Experience in customer service.

Availability during US business hours.

Proficiency in social media management and marketing tools.

title: Digital Designer – E-commerce & Web/UI (Project-Based)
description:
Job Title: Digital Designer – E-commerce & Web/UI (Project-Based)

Company: Premium international consumer brand (Manuka honey) operating across 15+ countries

Type: Project-based / Contract



About Us

We're a New Zealand-based premium Manuka honey brand selling across global markets through Shopify, Amazon, and our own e-commerce stores. We move fast, care deeply about brand quality, and need a designer who can keep up with the pace of a growing international business.

The Role

We're looking for a talented digital designer to work on a project basis across our e-commerce and web properties. You'll be designing for real customers across multiple international markets, so attention to detail and a sharp eye for clean, conversion-focused design is essential.

What You'll Be Working On



Shopify store pages, landing pages, and promotional banners across multiple regional stores

Amazon A+ Content, brand storefronts, and product listing imagery

Web and UI design for internal tools and customer-facing platforms

Occasional marketing assets for campaigns and product launches



What We're Looking For



A strong portfolio demonstrating e-commerce and/or web UI design work (this is non-negotiable — please include your portfolio link when applying)

Proficiency in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), and Canva

Experience designing for Shopify and/or Amazon marketplaces is a big plus

Understanding of conversion-focused design principles — you design to sell, not just to look pretty

Ability to work across brand guidelines and maintain consistency across markets

Strong communication, self-management, and ability to meet deadlines independently

Comfortable working across time zones (we're based in New Zealand)



Bonus Points



Experience with multilingual or multi-market design (EU, US, UK)

Motion graphics or light video editing skills

Familiarity with Shopify theme customization or basic HTML/CSS



To Apply

Send us your portfolio link and a short note on why you'd be a great fit. Show us your best e-commerce or web design work — we review portfolios before anything else.

title: Freelance Photo Editor / Retoucher (Lightroom Classic) – Commercial & Product Photography
description:
We are a Sydney-based digital and creative agency producing professional photography and visual content for businesses across Australia and internationally.



We are currently looking to recruit experienced freelance photo editors / retouchers to assist with ongoing project work.



The work involves editing and finishing photography for a range of industries including:



• construction & trade businesses

• real estate and property marketing

• automotive photography

• studio product photography

• commercial brand campaigns

• events and activations



This is not basic social media editing. The work involves professional client deliverables where colour accuracy, consistency and attention to detail are important.



Editors will be provided with:



• a detailed project brief

• RAW image files

• reference styles where required

• instructions for specific deliverables



Our goal is to build a small group of reliable editors who we can engage on an ongoing freelance basis as projects arise.



Projects may vary in complexity, but we are looking for editors who can consistently produce clean, professional results aligned with the brief.



_______________



Applicants must use:



• Adobe Lightroom Classic



Experience with Adobe Photoshop for advanced retouching, object removal, compositing or product work is a strong advantage.



_______________



Types of Editing Work



Projects may include:



• real estate HDR editing

• construction and architectural photography

• product photography colour correction and retouching

• studio photography editing

• commercial photography finishing

• event photography editing



Editors should be confident working with RAW files, colour correction, exposure balancing and HDR workflows where required.



_______________



We are prioritising portfolio work and real examples over resumes.



Please apply only if you can demonstrate experience editing photography such as:



• real estate photography

• construction / architectural photography

• product photography

• studio photography

• commercial brand photography



Consistency, colour accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important.

_______________



Technical Requirements



Applicants must have:



• strong written and spoken English

• a reliable computer capable of handling large RAW photo files

• stable high-speed internet connection

• reliable electricity / power availability

• ability to download and upload large batches of images

• good communication and responsiveness



We regularly transfer large batches of RAW photos, so stable internet is essential.

_______________



To apply, please include:

 1. Links to 3–5 examples of your best photo editing work

 2. Examples of HDR or real estate editing if available

 3. Your computer specifications (CPU / RAM)

 4. Your internet speed

 5. Your typical weekly availability



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



To confirm you have read this job description, please include the word CINEMA at the beginning of your application.

_______________

description:
Assist with the contracting process for new agents and tea
mbers.



Vet incoming applications by reviewing qualifications and initial fit.



Reach out to potential recruits to introduce the opportunity and conduct preliminary screenings.

Schedule qualified candidates on my calendar for final interviews once they pass the pre-screening stage.



Track recruiting numbers and maintain accurate reporting on application and hiring progress.



Process agent contracts through the platform and ensure all required documentation is completed.



Provide general backend support as needed to help streamline recruiting and onboarding operations.

description:
We are a performance marketing company that runs paid advertising on
, TikTok, and YouTube.



We are looking for a creative designer / video editor to help produce high volumes of advertising creatives.



Your job will be to create direct response ad creatives designed to generate leads and conversions.



Tasks include:



• Creating image ads for

• Editing short-form video ads (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

• Turning scripts or ideas into ad creatives

• Adding captions, hooks, and fast pacing to videos

Experience with
 ads, TikTok ads, or YouTube ads is a big advantage.

title: Lead Generation Specialist (B2B) – Immediate Start – Experienced Only
description:
Lead Generation Specialist (B2B) – Immediate Start – Experienced Only



We are an established accounting firm seeking a highly experienced Lead Generation Specialist to join our team full-time (Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM).



This role is not for beginners. We require someone with proven, consistent lead generation experience in 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025. If you do not meet this requirement, do not apply.



Key Responsibilities

 • Generate high-quality B2B leads for our accounting services

 • Use Google and online research tools to identify qualified prospects

 • Maintain accurate data collection and organization

 • Ensure all leads meet the required criteria

 • Work efficiently and consistently throughout the workday

 • Deliver reliable results with high attention to detail



Requirements

 • Minimum 4 years of continuous lead generation experience (2022–2025)

 • Strong ability to find and verify leads using Google

 • Experience generating B2B leads

 • Extremely reliable and detail-oriented

 • Able to work full-time (9–5) without supervision

 • Must be accurate and consistent

 • No training will be provided – you must already know how to do this work



Application Rules

 • Applicants must have 25 Apply Points to apply. Applications without this will be automatically deleted.

 • Do not apply if you do not have the required experience.

 • Time-wasters will be reported.

 • We are looking for someone who can start immediately and perform at a professional level from day one.



Proof of Experience Required



You must provide clear proof of your lead generation experience for the years 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025 (examples: previous client work, portfolio, screenshots, references, or verified profiles).



Application Questions

 1. What lead generation work did you perform in 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025? Please explain briefly.

 2. What tools and methods do you use to find B2B leads using Google?

 3. Can you provide proof of work or references from those years?

 4. Are you available to start immediately and work full-time 9–5 there’s no training?

5.
 address and what’s app contact number 

Only experienced professionals should apply.

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Local SEO / GBP Expert
description:
Are you a strategic thinker with a passion for Local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization? Do you excel in a fast-moving environment where integrity, measurable impact, and bold yet humble leadership are core values? If so, we’d love to meet you!



Relentless Digital is looking for a GBP Expert who is ready to take on the challenge of helping home service businesses dominate local search. You’ll play a key role in ensuring our clients appear in the local pack, map listings, and relevant searches through expert management of their Google Business Profiles and other local SEO strategies.



You'll also be responsible for keeping GBP profiles active - helping them quickly recover from suspensions or reverification issues.



We specialize in digital marketing tailored for home service providers, and we’re relentless in our pursuit of results. If you’re passionate about helping local businesses grow, and you’re driven by performance and innovation, this is your chance to make a real impact alongside a like-minded team of digital marketing professionals. 



========================================

CORE VALUES:

========================================



At Relentless Digital, our team lives by these principles:

- Be Relentless – We don’t give up. We find solutions and push through challenges to achieve results.

- Lead with Integrity – Honesty and trustworthiness guide every decision we make.

- Make Sh!t Happen – We take initiative and turn ideas into actions that deliver results.

- Make an Impact – We aim to leave a positive, lasting impression in everything we do.

- Bold Yet Humble – We advocate for our ideas while remaining open to feedback and continuous learning.



========================================

RESPONSIBILITIES:

========================================



Profile Optimization:

- Claim, verify, and fully optimize Google Business Profiles for clients or multiple locations.

- Execute and optimize local SEO strategies for home service businesses (primarily plumbing and HVAC).

- Work alongside On-Page Specialists to implement GBP ranking strategies.

- Conduct GBP audits, review competitor profiles and implement improvements.

- Analyze review trends to inform business or customer service improvements.



Insights & Reporting

- Analyze rankings, traffic, and conversion data to measure performance and provide recommendations.

- Monitor GBP insights (views, clicks, calls, direction requests, etc.).

- Track improvements in local search and map pack visibility



Profile Health & Compliance

- Ensure the profile adheres to Google’s guidelines to avoid suspension.

- Stay updated on changes to GBP features, policies, and best practices.

- Handle reinstatements and troubleshooting in case of suspensions or issues.



GBP Integration

- Ensure GBP links are properly set up (website, appointment URLs, menus, etc.).

- Coordinate with website team to ensure GBP and site info are aligned (schema, NAP consistency, UTM tagging).



========================================

QUALIFICATIONS:

========================================

- Proven experience in Local SEO, preferably 2+ years.

- Strong knowledge of Google Business Profile management.

- Experience with local citation building and cleanup. (e.g., BrightLocal, Whitespark)

- Familiarity with on-page SEO principles (meta tags, schema markup, etc.).

- Strong keyword research skills with a local intent focus.

- Ability to track and measure performance using tools like Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other SEO tools (e.g. Places Scout, Local Brand Manager).

- Experience optimizing for local pack rankings and map visibility.



====================

TO APPLY:

Incomplete applications will not be considered.

====================



If you’re ready to join a team where you can make a lasting impact, follow the instructions below to apply:

 

Your Response Must Include:

- A resume or detailed work history showcasing your relevant experience.

 

Complete, thoughtful answers to the following questions:

- What are the first 3 things you focus on when doing an initial GBP optimization, and why?

- How many GBPs have you managed at 1 time?

- How many GBPs have you helped recover from reverification and suspension?

 

Note: This role requires availability during U.S. daytime hours to ensure effective communication and collaboration with our team and clients.

title: Content Operation Manager
description:
Here is a structured job description you can use for hiring a Content Operations Manager at IndexLLM.

It is tailored to your GEO/AEO model (Reddit, Quora, Medium, etc.) and operational content workflows.

Content Operations Manager

GEO / AEO Agency (AI Search Visibility)

Company: IndexLLM

Location: Remote / Global

Department: Content & Operations

Reports To: Head of Growth / Founder

Role Overview

IndexLLM is a fast-growing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) agency helping B2B SaaS, fintech, cybersecurity, and technology companies dominate visibility inside AI-driven search engines such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

We are looking for a Content Operations Manager to build, manage, and scale the operational engine behind our multi-platform content distribution strategy across Reddit, Quora, Medium, LinkedIn, and other authority platforms.

This role combines content operations, workflow management, quality control, and cross-team coordination to ensure that high-quality, research-driven content is consistently published, tracked, and optimized for AI visibility.

Key Responsibilities

Content Production Operations

• Manage the end-to-end workflow of GEO/AEO content production

• Coordinate with research, SEO, GEO, and copywriting teams

• Ensure content pipelines run efficiently across multiple platforms

• Maintain structured publishing calendars for all client accounts

Multi-Platform Publishing

Oversee publishing and engagement strategies across platforms including:

• Reddit

• Quora

• Medium

• LinkedIn

• Industry forums and knowledge hubs

Ensure content is native to each platform, aligns with community guidelines, and supports long-term visibility in AI search engines.

Client Campaign Management

• Manage operational execution for multiple client accounts simultaneously

• Track deliverables and publishing schedules

• Ensure all client campaigns meet agreed KPIs and deadlines

• Coordinate with account managers and strategy teams

Quality Assurance

• Review content for credibility, tone, and authority signals

• Ensure content aligns with E-E-A-T standards (Experience, Expertise, Authority, Trust)

• Maintain editorial consistency across platforms and clients

Data & Performance Tracking

• Monitor content performance signals including:

Visibility in AI answers

Engagement metrics on platforms

Keyword and topic authority growth

• Report performance insights and optimization opportunities

Process & Workflow Development

• Design and improve operational workflows for scaling content production

• Develop SOPs for platform publishing and moderation

• Implement automation where possible using tools such as:

ClickUp / Notion

Airtable

SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush)

AI content workflows

Key KPIs

The Content Operations Manager will be measured on:

• On-time delivery of client content

• Number of quality placements across authority platforms

• Engagement metrics (upvotes, comments, visibility)

• Content quality and editorial consistency

• Operational efficiency and scalability

Required Skills & Experience

• 4+ years experience in content operations, SEO content management, or editorial operations

• Strong understanding of SEO, GEO, and AI-driven search ecosystems

• Experience managing multi-platform content distribution

• Strong project management and organizational skills

• Experience working with remote content teams and freelancers

• Ability to manage multiple clients and publishing pipelines simultaneously

Preferred Experience

• Experience with Reddit and Quora content strategies

• Familiarity with Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

• Background in B2B SaaS or technology marketing

• Experience managing content production teams

Tools & Platforms

The role may involve working with tools such as:

• Ahrefs / Semrush

• ChatGPT / AI content workflows

• ClickUp / Notion / Airtable

• Google Docs & Sheets

• Content analytics tools

What Success Looks Like

Within the first 90 days, the Content Operations Manager will:

• Build a scalable content operations workflow

• Manage publishing pipelines across all platforms

• Successfully operate multiple GEO/AEO client campaigns

• Establish quality and editorial guidelines

• Deliver consistent content distribution across authority platforms

title: Sales Support Specialist  - Long Term, Part-Time Contract
description:
**Intro**

Kumusta!



Finding the right long-term client is hard. Many roles look good at first, but turn into unclear expectations, constant changes, and pressure without support. We operate in a different way.



We run a structured, system-driven sales operation with clear workflows and clear targets. The rules of the role are clearly defined so everyone knows what “good work” looks like. At the same time, we are always improving, and we value thoughtful input from people who first understand the system and then help make it better over time.



This role is a good fit for someone who enjoys organized work, takes pride in reliability and follow-through, and is comfortable working within established processes. However, if you notice a better way to do something after learning how we work, we want to hear it.



Hindi ito para sa lahat.



If you’re looking for a role where you simply do the minimum and wait for instructions, this won’t be a fit. We’re looking for someone who takes pride in going above and beyond: someone who follows the system, hits the targets, and then looks for small ways to improve the work, the process, or the outcome over time. If you enjoy structure, clear expectations, and being part of a team where extra effort is noticed and rewarded, please keep reading.



One last thing, just so you know who you’re working with. I've sold a business before and work in 3 others. Mahigit pitong taon na kaming kumukuha ng mga empleyado galing sa Pilipinas. In one of our other businesses, one of my strongest tea
mbers has been with me for nearly 5 years. We value long-term relationships. If you do good work, communicate clearly, and take ownership, we’re the kind of client who will keep you around and invest in you. Salamat!



**Role Purpose & Why We’re Hiring**



We are growing a sales agency. As we continue to land more clients, we are handling more conversations, messages, and opportunities every week. We already have strong systems and messaging in place, but as volume increases, it has become harder to keep up with replies, follow-ups, calendar scheduling, and record-keeping without pulling time away from higher-level work. This role exists to help keep communication flowing smoothly so opportunities don’t get missed and the business can continue to grow.



**What You’ll Be Doing Day to Day**



As a Sales Support Specialist, you’ll help manage outreach and responses across
, LinkedIn, voi
 (via automated voi
 drops), and our CRM system. This includes sending messages using approved templates, dropping pre-recorded voi
s, keeping contact records accurate, and helping confirm phone numbers or basic contact details. You’ll work and interact with other tea
mbers internally and also keep an eye on the tools we use to make sure messages are sent properly and nothing falls through the cracks. Finally, you’ll coordinate the scheduling of appointments so that we can actually close deals. The goal is simple: respond quickly, stay organized, and keep things moving. 



**How Success Is Measured**



Doing well in this role means staying consistent and reliable. Messages are sent on time, follow-ups aren’t missed, records are kept clean, and prospects receive clear, timely responses. We track daily activity, response speed, accuracy, and overall dependability. We also want candidates who pay attention to detail, so attach a picture of a pink cadillac somewhere in your application if you do. Your work will be visible through the systems we use, and steady performance is more important than perfection. This is a role for someone who takes pride in follow-through.



**Past Experience (Helpful, Not Required)**



If you have worked in sales outreach role before or customer support, that is a huge plus (though not required - we will also provide clear instructions). Familiarity with CRMs,
 tools, LinkedIn messaging, or power dialers can be helpful, as is any background that involves responding to messages, keeping records organized, or supporting a fast-moving team. If you’ve worked in a role where accuracy, follow-up, and communication mattered, that experience will translate well here.



**Who This Role Is For & What to Expect**



This role is a good fit for someone who enjoys structured work, can handle multiple tasks without getting overwhelmed, and prefers clear expectations. The role starts part-time with a consistent 2-3 hour daily block beginning at 10am, 11am, or 12pm Eastern for a total of 10-15 hours per week. This role is paid hourly, typically in the range of $2.50–$5.00 USD per hour, depending on experience and performance.  There is room to grow in hours, responsibility, and pay over time for someone who performs well and wants to stay long term.



If you’re interested, take the next step by filling out the application below:

title: Application Funnel Specialist (Contract Acquisition) - Long term, Part Time Role
description:
**Intro**



Kumusta!



Finding a reliable long-term client for online work isn’t easy. Many roles sound clear at first, then slowly turn into unclear expectations, shifting priorities, and pressure without structure. We don’t operate that way.



Our contract acquisition work is structured, system-driven, and tied directly to daily sales activity. The standards for “good work” are defined up front: clear volume targets, clear response rules, and clear tracking requirements. Once you learn the system, your job is to execute it consistently (and then help us improve it over time with thoughtful feedback).



This role is a good fit for someone who enjoys routine, clear rules, and measurable output. It’s also for someone who understands that missed follow-ups, slow responses, or sloppy tracking directly impact results.



Hindi ito para sa lahat.



If you’re looking for flexible expectations or loosely monitored work, this won’t be a fit. We expect consistency, ownership, and accountability. For the right person, this is a stable, long-term role with a client who values reliability and steady execution.



One last thing, just so you know who you’re working with. I've sold a business before and work in 3 others. Mahigit pitong taon na kaming kumukuha ng mga empleyado galing sa Pilipinas. In one of our other businesses, one of my strongest tea
mbers has been with me for nearly 5 years. We value long-term relationships. If you do good work, communicate clearly, and take ownership, we’re the kind of client who will keep you around and invest in you. Salamat!



**Role Purpose & Why We’re Hiring**



Our sales operation depends on consistent application volume to generate interviews, conversations, and new contracts. As activity increases across platforms, execution — not strategy — becomes the bottleneck.

This role exists to ensure the application funnel runs smoothly every day. Without someone dedicated to submitting applications, tracking activity, and responding on time, opportunities slow down and 
ntum is lost. This work directly supports contract acquisition and revenue and must be handled accurately and consistently.



**What You’ll Be Doing Day to Day**



As an Application Funnel Specialist, your day-to-day work focuses on submitting applications and managing responses across defined platforms such as OTE listings and Upwork.



You will identify qualified opportunities, submit applications using approved templates, and send direct messages when required. You’ll keep records up to date, respond promptly to inbound messages, and schedule interviews quickly so interest is not lost.



Each day, your goal is to meet volume targets, maintain clean tracking, respond on time, and ensure no active opportunity is left unattended.



**How Success Is Measured**



Success in this role is measured through clear output and response standards.



There will be a gradual build up in numbers the first two weeks. However, at the busiest time, between all platforms, we expect 70-100 applications per day that result in scheduling interviews for our main candidates 3-4 times per week. 



Depending on our current saturation levels, the number of applications may go up or down. We will provide you with the tools and scripts so that you can keep up this number of applications in a given amount of time. Still, attention to detail matters, so to confirm that you're paying attention please send us a picture of a green cadillac via messenger or some other means during your application. 



**Past Experience (Helpful, Not Required)**



Experience with high-volume applications, online marketplaces, or structured outbound work is helpful but not required. Familiarity with spreadsheets, tracking systems, or message-based workflows is a plus.



What matters most is your ability to follow instructions, stay organized, and deliver consistent, measurable output.



**Who This Role Is For & What to Expect**



This role is best for someone who prefers clear expectations, structured workflows, and objective performance metrics. You should be comfortable with repetitive, volume-based work and staying focused over time.



The role typically starts at 20–30 hours per week and is paid hourly, usually in the range of $2.50–$5.00 USD per hour, depending on experience and performance. There is room to grow in hours and responsibility over time for strong, reliable performers.



If this sounds like a fit, please apply using the link below:

title: VA Admin Support
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link: 
/work-opportunities/administration-agent

title: AI Operations & Outreach Assistant (Clay Specialist)
description:
Company Overview

We are an AI consultancy helping high-growth hardware devices and medical aesthetic brands scale. Currently, we are partnering with NIRA Skin, a US-based leader in at-home laser technology. We use cutting-edge tools like Clay to identify and engage with top-tier Venture Capital firms, Family Offices, and Strategic Partners. We value "smart speed"—using AI to do the heavy lifting so our leadership can focus on high-level relationships.



Role and Responsibilities

As our AI Operations Assistant, you will be the "pilot" of our outreach engine. You will manage our 
 workspace to enrich investor data, verify contacts, and ensure our outreach to VCs and strategic partners is precise and personalized.



Key Responsibilities:



Clay Workflow Management: Manage our lead lists within Clay. Run "waterfalls" to find verified
s for Partners at VCs and Family Offices.



AI Quality Control: Review AI-generated snippets (using Claygent) to ensure they are accurate, human-sounding, and free of "hallucinations" before we hit send.



CRM & Sheet Syncing: Ensure our master Google Sheet and Clay tables are perfectly synced, marking "No Responses," "Passes," and "Interested" leads daily.



Investor Research: Identify the correct partner within a VC firm who focuses on Medical Tech or DTC Hardware to ensure we aren't "one-deep" on outreach.



Outreach Execution: Support the deployment of personalized
 sequences through our sending tools (e.g., Instantly or Clay native).



How Success Will Be Measured (KPIs)

Data Integrity: 100?curacy in contact information found (zero "X's" in the contact column).



Output Quality: Percentage of AI-generated outreach drafts that require zero editing.



Follow-up Consistency: Ensuring zero "dark" leads go more than 7 days without a triggered follow-up.



Skills and Experience Required

Must-Haves:




 Proficiency: You must understand how to use Clay (enrichments, waterfalls, and AI prompts).



DTC/VC Literacy: Ability to distinguish between different types of investors (Venture vs. Private Equity vs. Strategic).



Meticulous Detail: You will be handling high-value relationships; a typo in an
 to a Billion-dollar fund is a dealbreaker.



Google Workspace: Expert level in Google Sheets (formulas, Vlookups, and conditional formatting).



Nice-to-Haves:



Experience with Pitchbook or Crunchbase.



Familiarity with the Medical Aesthetics or Skincare industry.



Experience with
 deliverability tools.



Benefits: Exposure to world-class AI tools (Clay, LLMs), direct involvement in a high-profile hardware brand growth story, and remote flexibility.



Google Forms Pre-Qualification Questions (Crucial for Clay)

To ensure you get a VA who can actually handle the tech, ask these:



The Clay Test: "Describe a specific 'Waterfall' enrichment you have built in Clay. Which providers did you use to find professional
s?"



The Research Test: "If I give you a VC firm like 'Sequoia Capital' and tell you to find the partner most likely to invest in a medical laser device, how would you find that specific person?"



The AI Prompt Test: "How do you ensure an AI-generated
 doesn't sound like a bot? What is your process for 'reviewing' AI outputs?"



The Video: "Provide a 60-second Loom video showing us a Clay table you've worked on in the past (or explaining your favorite Clay feature)."

title: VA with Social Media and GHL
description:
Hiring: AI-Savvy Virtual Assistant ? Future Social Media Operations Lead



Company: AI Consulting & Automation Firm

Location: Remote

Position: Part-Time (10–15 hrs/week to start)

Growth Path: Social Media Operations Lead



???? About the Company



We are a growing AI consulting and automation firm focused on helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and professionals leverage AI to improve efficiency, automate workflows, and grow revenue.



Our work includes:



AI consulting and strategy



automation and AI tools



digital education and workshops



business workflow optimization



We are building a strong digital presence and are looking for someone who can execute our content strategy, support marketing campaigns, and grow with the company.



???? Role Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented, AI-savvy Virtual Assistant to help manage and execute our social media presence and digital content campaigns.



Your primary responsibilities will include content posting, video content creation, campaign support, and social media management.



The right candidate will have the opportunity to grow into a Social Media Operations Lead, helping oversee digital content systems as the company expands.



???? Required Experience



Applicants should have:



? At least 1 year of content creation or social media management experience



? 6–12 months of consistent experience using Growth Hub (or a similar CRM/marketing automation platform)



? Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT to support content creation



? Experience creating video content for social media, advertising, and marketing campaigns



???? Content Creation Skills



The ideal candidate should be comfortable creating and editing content such as:



Short-form video (Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn video posts)



Promotional content for campaigns



Educational or informational posts



Basic video editing for marketing content



Repurposing video clips into multiple social posts



Experience with tools such as Canva, CapCut, or similar content tools is preferred.



???? Responsibilities

Content & Posting



Schedule and publish social media posts across platforms



Maintain a consistent posting schedule



Repurpose long-form content into short-form posts



Video Content



Create short promotional videos for campaigns



Edit simple video clips for social media



Support marketing and workshop promotions through video content



Campaign Support



Assist with launching digital campaigns



Schedule promotional posts for events and workshops



Monitor basic engagement metrics



Operations & Systems



Follow documented SOPs step-by-step



Organize content folders and posting calendars



Assist with Growth Hub workflows and marketing automation



???? Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



? Works efficiently and independently

? Is highly organized and detail-oriented

? Is comfortable using AI tools

? Can follow systems and SOPs precisely

? Communicates clearly and professionally

? Wants to grow into a leadership role managing content operations



You don’t need to create the strategy — your role is to execute it effectively and consistently.



???? Growth Opportunity



This position has the potential to grow into a Social Media Operations Lead role, overseeing content workflows, campaigns, and social media systems as the company scales.



? Time Commitment



10–20 hours per week to start.



???? To Apply



Please submit:



A short introduction about yourself



Examples of video or social media content you’ve created



Your Growth Hub experience (6–12 months)



Social media accounts or brands you’ve supported



Your availability and hourly rate

title: AI Native/Forward Virtual Assistant
description:
About Dreambound Inc.



Dreambound Inc. is a platform dedicated to facilitating upward mobility in America. Our mission is to help prospective students find the right educational programs across Healthcare, Technology, Business, and Trade and Industry so they can achieve their career goals. We connect students with 300+ schools, offer personalized coaching, and provide the support needed to take charge of their future. We are a fast-paced, mission-driven team committed to making education accessible and impactful.





What We're Looking For 



We're looking for someone who has substantially integrated AI tools into their daily life and workflow. They know how to use various AI tools to effectively execute end-to-end (including knowing where a human needs to be in the loop). 

If you're “AI pilled” and a power user of tools such as (but not limited to) Gemini, Claude, Claude code/Co-work, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Loveable, ReTool, Codex, etc. we want to talk to you!



The skill we're looking for is less "can you use AI?" and more "can you think clearly enough about a complex problem, and have enough experience with a tool, that you can direct/ re-direct it to solve it?" 



This is a full-time role (40 hours per week). Please use the code DreamTeam when applying through the link below.



What You'll Work On



Responsibilities may vary widely depending upon background/experience, but these are the areas of expertise we’re most interested in:

- Go-to-market, lead generation, and business development

- General operations and administrative tasks

- Product management, design, or engineering

- Workflow automation and process improvement

- Data organization, analysis, tracking, and reporting

- Adaptability to execute ad hoc projects across a fast-moving team



You're a Strong Fit If You...



- Genuinely love to use AI and are able to use it creatively. You should be able to articulate how you've used AI to do things faster, better, or that you couldn't have done otherwise

- Are naturally curious, resourceful, proactive, and have a strong growth mindset

- Have strong written English and attention to detail

- Have experience in integrating AI into workflows involving operations, engineering, product, marketing, data, or other related skills



Nice to Haves

- Experience with Google Sheets, Airtable, or data tools

- Background in lead gen, content, digital marketing, advertising, or Edtech

- Familiarity with automation tools like 
, Zapier, Slack, N8n, or similar



Apply now!

Please use this link to apply:

title: Program Coordination and Support VA with HubSpot Experience
description:
Here’s a quick video sharing why you may want to work with me! 
 



Role Overview:

I’m looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Program Coordination and Support Virtual Assistant to support my coaching programs and membership. I have strong SOPs in place and need someone who can confidently implement them, manage live session production, maintain marketing systems, and ensure our programs run smoothly. This remote role is ideal for someone who is process-driven, tech-savvy, and thrives in a collaborative, fast-moving environment.



Requirements:

*Must be able to work 20 hours weekly

*Must be able to work 8am-12pm Pacific Time (US)

*Must have strong written and verbal communication

*Highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities independently

*Must be process-driven

*Must be able to see the big picture, and identify areas of improvement (e.g., what we’re missing, what needs to be shared with the team, what we could be considering)

*Must care about helping others

*Must be a problem solver with a desire to research and present options for solutions 

*Must be able to provide exceptional customer service

*Must be great with technology

*Must be able to work well with a small, diverse team of contractors



What You’ll Do:



Must-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Must Be Proficient In):



These are the tasks the VA needs to handle independently and confidently from day one:



Operations Support:

*Serve as Producer for live sessions, including monthly 45-minute preview sessions and two (2) monthly SIC Membership sessions

*Issue ICF CCE credentials to participants upon completion of programs and workshops

*Draft two (2) presentation decks per month and production agendas for SIC sessions (I have templates already drafted, you will just align the content and update the guests so they are ready for the facilitator and content manager)

*Support overall program management for C2C, S4S, and SIC programs



Marketing Support:

*Update website with new program and session dates and links

*Perform quality assurance on marketing materials (social, print, website)

*Update HubSpot landing pages, lead generation downloads, and workflow
s with provided content (you don’t need to be an expert in HubSpot, but  having experience using HubSpot specifically for workflows, landing pages, forms, and
s would be very helpful and will allow my Marketing Manager to hand off implementation with guidance)



Nice-to-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Can Learn Over Time):



These tasks are valuable but can be trained on the job:



Executive Support:

*Monitor, manage, and respond to
s  

*Draft client communications for review using my custom AI

*Apply standard messaging logic to LinkedIn responses with support fro



Administrative Support:

*Act as Backup Producer for programs and workshops (C2C & S4S)

*Manage assigned Trello boards with accuracy and timeliness

*Navigate updates, cloning, and content management within the LMS platform (LearnWorlds)

*Maintain and update internal process documentation and operating manuals

*Join monthly Tea
etings and Quarterly Business Review (QBR) meetings

*Attend Content & Marketing meetings as needed

*Manage annual holiday cards and gift coordination

*Provide general operational support as the business evolves

*Support Hudson Phoenix Area Community calendaring and communications



Ready to Apply?

1. Message me with the subject “I'm excited to work with you, Elissa!”

2. Add a link to your resume

3. Indicate your contact
 address



If this doesn’t sound perfect but you love hard work and learning, reach out anyway—there’s likely another chance to join my team!

title: Inbound Call Agent (Appointment Setter)
description:
We are hiring part-time inbound call agents to answer calls from business owners responding to our marketing campaigns. Your job is to answer the call, ask a few quick questions, and schedule a Zoo
eting for our team.



This is not cold calling. You will only answer inbound calls from business owners who contact us first.



You will use GoHighLevel (GHL) to schedule appointments and record notes.



Responsibilities



Answer inbound calls from business owners



Follow a simple call flow



Ask qualification questions



Schedule Zoom appointments in GoHighLevel (GHL)



Enter notes in the CRM



Maintain a professional and friendly tone





Requirements



Must speak clear English



Comfortable speaking with business owners



Reliable internet connection



Quiet workspace for calls



Ability to follow a simple process



Able to learn and use GoHighLevel (GHL)





Compensation



$5 per qualified booking



$100 bonus for every contract signed from your booked appointment



Long term opportunity for reliable agents





What Is a Qualified Booking

A qualified booking must meet all of the following:



The business owner agrees to a Zoo
eting



The meeting is scheduled in GoHighLevel



The business owner answers all qualification questions correctly



The appointment actually happens (the business owner attends the Zoo
eting)





How to Apply

Please include the following with your application:



A 30 second voice recording introducing yourself



Your experience answering inbound calls or booking appointments



Your availability during US business hours





Preferred Experience



Call center experience



Appointment setting



CRM experience



GoHighLevel experience
