title: Remote Customer Support & Admin Assistant for Property Management Company (Airbnb + Housing)
description:
Remote Customer Support & Admin Assistant for Property Management Company (Airbnb + Housing)



We are a growing U.S.-based housing company looking for a reliable, organized, and friendly Remote Assistant to help manage guest communication, housing inquiries, and administrative tasks.



Our company operates short-term rentals (Airbnb), sober living homes, and room rentals, and we need someone who can help us respond quickly to guests and potential residents.



This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, comfortable communicating in English, and enjoys helping people.



We are looking for someone interested in long-term, stable work with a respectful employer.



Pay

$4–$6 per hour depending on experience

Raises are available based on reliability and performance.



Preferred Work Schedule

6.5 hours per day

6 days per week

6:00 AM – 12:00 PM Philippines Time

(3:00 PM – 9:00 PM Arizona Time)

This schedule aligns with our busiest guest communication hours but we are open to different times.



Main Responsibilities:

Airbnb Guest Support (40%)

- Respond to guest messages and questions

- Assist with reservation issues or changes

- Communicate with Airbnb support when needed

- Help ensure guests have a smooth and positive stay

- Monitor guest messages and respond promptly



Housing Inquiries & Lead Communication (40%)

- Post advertisements for room rentals and sober living housing

- Respond to inquiries from potential residents

- Answer questions about housing and the application process

- Communicate through
, text,
, and messaging platforms

- Help guide potential residents through next steps to secure housing



Administrative Support (20%)

- Data entry and updating information in property management software

- Organizing communication records

- Simple research tasks

- Supporting daily business operations



Communication Expectations:

You will be asked to communicate through a variety of modalities including,


Social Media Messaging platforms

Property management software

 messages

Text messaging



You should also be comfortable speaking with native English speakers by phone.

Expect 2–3 short phone calls per day.

Most communication will still be written.



Requirements:

Strong written and spoken English

Friendly and professional communication style

Reliable internet connection

Ability to stay organized while managing multiple conversations

Comfortable using messaging apps and online software

Customer service mindset

Ability to work independently and follow instructions



Nice to Have (Not Required):

Experience communicating with Airbnb guests

Virtual assistant or customer service experience

Experience with property management software



What We Are Looking For:

Someone who is,

Reliable and responsive

Friendly and patient with guests and applicants

Detail-oriented

Able to solve problems independently

Interested in long-term employment



Application Instructions:

To be considered for this job, please follow these instructions carefully.



1, Start your application with the phrase: "I am excited to apply to Juniper Recovery Homes."



2. Answer this question:



A guest messages saying the WiFi is not working and they are frustrated.

How would you respond to them through the Airbnb message thread?



3. Please include a 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself in English.



4. Tell us in a written message or a voice recording:

- Your internet speed

- If you can work 6 AM – 12 PM Philippines time

- How many jobs you currently have



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: AI Document Processing System (OCR + Data Extraction)
description:
Estimated Timeline: 4–6 weeks





PROJECT OVERVIEW



We are building an AI-powered document intelligence system that converts large volumes of structured and unstructured documents into a searchable analytics database.



The goal of Phase 1 is to build the core intelligence engine that can ingest documents, extract structured data using AI, store the results in a database, and generate basic analytics.



This is a backend-heavy project involving:



- OCR

- Document ingestion pipelines

- AI-based information extraction

- Database design

- Analytics-ready data structures



This project is ideal for a developer experienced with Python, AI APIs, and document processing systems.





WHAT YOU WILL BUILD (PHASE 1)



You will build a working backend system capable of:



1. Document Storage System

   - Store uploaded PDF documents

   - Track metadata for each document



2. Document Ingestion Pipeline

   - Detect new uploaded files

   - Register metadata

   - Send documents through processing stages



3. OCR Processing

   - Extract text from scanned PDFs

   - Process documents page by page

   - Recommended tool: Tesseract



4. AI Data Extraction

   - Use an AI API to extract structured fields from text

   - Convert unstructured document text into structured records



5. Database System

   - PostgreSQL database

   - Store structured extracted data

   - Maintain references to original documents



6. Basic Analytics Layer

   - Generate structured datasets ready for dashboards



7. Simple AI Query Interface

   - Allow natural language questions against stored data





RECOMMENDED TECHNOLOGY STACK



Preferred technologies (open to suggestions):



- Python

- FastAPI or Flask

- PostgreSQL

- Tesseract OCR

- OpenAI or similar AI API

- AWS S3 or Supabase storage





EXAMPLE TASKS



Examples of tasks you may complete:



- Build a document ingestion pipeline

- Integrate OCR text extraction

- Write scripts that parse document text

- Use AI APIs to extract structured fields

- Design PostgreSQL tables for structured data

- Connect the system to a simple analytics dashboard





REQUIRED SKILLS



Strong experience with:



- Python

- API integration

- Database design

- Working with structured and unstructured data

- OCR and document processing

- AI APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)



Bonus experience:



- FastAPI

- Supabase

- Data pipelines

- Document parsing

- Analytics dashboards





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



At the end of Phase 1 the system should be able to:



- Ingest documents

- Extract structured data

- Store the data in PostgreSQL

- Support analytics and AI queries





TIMELINE



Estimated build time:



4–6 weeks





HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



1. Examples of similar systems you have built

2. Your experience with OCR or document processing

3. Your experience using AI APIs

4. Your preferred development stack

5. Your hourly rate or fixed project estimate





We are looking for a developer who enjoys building data and AI systems, not just websites.



If the Phase 1 build goes well, there will be opportunities to continue working on future phases of the platform.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive, organized, and dependable Administrative Assistant to support our executives or supervisors in a remote work environment. The ideal candidate will excel in managing meetings, sending invites, updating schedules, taking detailed notes, and following up on action items until they are completed. This role requires strong communication, time management, and multitasking abilities, along with a high level of professionalism and discretion.



Key Responsibilities

• Attend meetings, take accurate notes, and provide reminders and follow-ups on discussed action items

• Send meeting invites, manage schedules, and update calendars to ensure all appointments and deadlines are met

• Proactively follow up with executives or supervisors and tea
mbers to ensure tasks are completed

• Maintain organized calendars, manage schedules, and coordinate appointments

• Answer
s on behalf of executives or supervisors, or assist with drafting, reviewing, and managing
 correspondence as directed

• Handle sensitive and confidential information with integrity

• Prioritize tasks, manage multiple assignments simultaneously, and meet deadlines

• Communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with executives or supervisors and colleagues

• Support executives or supervisors with project coordination, including planning, execution, and follow-up

• Collaborate with other departments to ensure smooth coordination of tasks and projects

• Utilize office software and collaboration tools such as Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Planner, Power Automate, Microsoft Office, Cisco IP Communicator, Google Workspace, and CRM systems to manage daily tasks and workflows

• Demonstrate flexibility and adaptability to changing priorities and business needs



Required Traits and Skills

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Clear and professional verbal and written communication

• Ability to prioritize effectively and meet deadlines

• Discretion and confidentiality when handling sensitive information

• Proactive mindset with the ability to anticipate needs

description:
Job Description

Job Overview: 



We are seeking a detail-oriented Property Management Accounting Assistant to support the financial operations of a rental property portfolio. This role will focus on maintaining accurate financial records within AppFolio, ensuring that property-related transactions are properly categorized, documented, and reported. The ideal candidate will assist with day-to-day accounting tasks, maintain organized financial documentation, and generate financial reports to support property performance analysis and decision-making.

Experience preparing or generating financial reports such as Profit & Loss statements and Balance Sheets.

High level of attention to detail and accuracy when handling financial data.

Strong organizational and documentation skills.

Ability to manage multiple tasks and maintain organized records across multiple properties.

Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets.

Strong written and verbal communication skills.

title: Lead Generation & Social Media Management Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Title: Lead Generation & Social Media Management Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)



Company: Cramerton Clean Pros

Salary: $565/month + performance-based bonuses



---



About Us



Cramerton Clean Pros is a North Carolina–based exterior cleaning and restoration company. We specialize in pressure washing, soft washing, window cleaning, and a wide variety of exterior cleaning services for residential and commercial properties.



Our company prides itself on high-quality service and strong dedication to our customers. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a talented and motivated Virtual Assistant who can help us expand our marketing reach and generate new commercial opportunities.



---



Position Overview



We are looking for a Lead Generation & Social Media Management Virtual Assistant whose primary focus will be generating new leads and growing our brand presence online.



This is not a basic administrative position. We want someone who is creative, proactive, and motivated to help grow a real business.



Your work will directly contribute to bringing in new commercial clients and expanding our digital presence.



---



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation & Outreach



Your primary responsibility will be generating leads through strategic outreach and research.



This may include:



- Researching businesses that may need exterior cleaning services

 outreach

  - Business research and prospecting

- Identifying opportunities to promote services such as:

  - Window cleaning

  - Commercial pressure washing

  - Building washing

  - Exterior cleaning services

- Helping generate 5+ qualified leads per week



Target industries include:



- Property managers

- Apartment complexes

- HOAs

- Restaurants

- Retail centers

- Warehouses

- Industrial facilities

- Office buildings



---



Social Media Management



You will also manage and grow our social media presence.



Responsibilities include:



- Creating social media posts

- Scheduling content

- Engaging with followers

- Responding to comments and messages

- Growing our audience and engagement

- Assisting with brand awareness initiatives



Platforms include:



-

- Instagram

- TikTok

- LinkedIn

- Meta Business Suite



---



Marketing & Strategy Support



We want someone who can think creatively and help us grow.



This may include:



- Suggesting new lead generation strategies

- Researching outreach opportunities

- Helping develop marketing campaigns

- Supporting digital marketing initiatives



---



Tools You May Use



You may work with tools such as:



- Housecall Pro

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Canva

- Meta Business Suite

- ChatGPT

- Other related marketing or outreach software



---



Work Schedule



- Full-time position

- Preferred hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

- Schedule may be flexible but must overlap with U.S. Eastern Time



---



Compensation



- $565/month

- Performance-based bonuses available for:

  - Lead generation performance

  - Successful outreach campaigns

  - Social media growth and engagement



---



Requirements



- Experience with lead generation, outreach, or marketing

- Experience managing social media accounts

- Excellent written English

- Strong spoken English

- Neutral accent is a bonus but not required

- Reliable internet connection

- Quiet work environment

- Good audio quality for communication



---



Growth Opportunity



This position has massive upward mobility for the right person.



The right candidate — someone who is dedicated, detail-oriented, and brings a positive attitude — can grow into a Digital Operations Manager role within our company as we continue expanding.



We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term career with us, not just a temporary job.



---



How to Apply



To apply, please follow these instructions carefully:



1. At the top of your application, include the word CRAMERTON so we know you read the entire job post.

title: Supply Chain Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote / U.S.-Based Operations (Pacific Standard Time)



Schedule: Full-time, Long-term position



Hours: 5:30 AM – 1:30 PM PST



About the Role

We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Supply Chain Coordinator to support our U.S.-based operations on a long-term basis. This position plays a critical role in managing domestic (primarily) and occasional international shipments, ensuring smooth logistics execution, accurate documentation, and timely invoicing. The ideal candidate is highly organized, excels at heavy
-based communication, and is comfortable with data entry and administrative tasks in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Coordinate and book primarily U.S. domestic shipments (with some international), including carrier selection, scheduling, and tracking to ensure on-time delivery.



Manage high-volume
 correspondence with carriers, suppliers and internal teams.



Accurately record and document shipment pricing, rates, and related information in our proprietary software system.

Maintain and update Excel spreadsheets for logistics tracking, reporting, and analysis.



Generate and prepare invoices based on shipment data and agreed pricing.



Perform general data entry and administrative support across other areas of the business as needed to support overall supply chain efficiency.



Qualifications & Skills 



Strong attention to detail and accuracy in data handling and documentation.

Excellent written communication skills for professional
 interactions (or the use of Ai to help make them professional).

Proficiency with Microsoft Excel and comfort learning proprietary software (simple software).

Experience in logistics, supply chain, transportation, or a related administrative role is preferred but not required—we value reliability and a proactive mindset.

Ability to work independently during early morning hours in PST.

Commitment to long-term stability and contributing to a small, collaborative team.







What We Offer



Stable, long-term employment with a growing U.S.-based operation.

Opportunity to grow within supply chain and logistics functions.

Hourly pay, company supplied laptop and monitor, performance bonuses.





Please submit your resume and a brief note about your relevant experience.

title: Website Migration & Redesign - Squarespace to Go High Level
description:
WEBSITE MIGRATION SPECIALIST - SQUARESPACE TO GO HIGH LEVEL



JOB TYPE: Project-Based, possible on going work after build.

PAY: $5 USD per hour, estimated 40 hours

DEADLINE: April 7th



ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are migrating our website from Squarespace to Go High Level for a Managed IT Services Provider based in Spokane, WA. The GHL template is already selected and most of the content is written. We need someone to adapt that content to fit our brand voice and the template, develop 2 to 3 lead magnets, and perform on-page SEO across all pages.



Our target audience is professional services businesses in Spokane including financial advisors, manufacturers, attorneys, and real estate firms. The messaging needs to speak directly to business owners who are not overly technical but care deeply about reliability, security, and not having to think about their IT.



This is an execution role. The heavy lifting on content strategy is done, but requires manipulation to be applies to the new GHL site.. We need someone detail-oriented who can take what we have, make it fit, and make it convert.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

Adapt existing website copy into the GHL template with attention to brand voice and conversion. Build 2 to 3 lead magnets tailored to professional services business owners and set up the corresponding opt-in forms and funnels inside GHL. Perform on-page SEO including meta titles, descriptions, headers, and internal linking.



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

You have real hands-on GHL experience. You understand conversion-focused copy and can apply a brand voice without needing heavy direction. You communicate proactively and can commit to an April 7th deadline. Please only apply if you are available to start within the next few days.



HOW TO APPLY

Share 1 to 2 examples of GHL sites you have built or migrated, either a live URL or screenshots. Answer this question: we serve professional services businesses in Spokane who worry about downtime, data loss, and unreliable IT support. Visit 
 and tell us what you would change on the homepage headline and CTA to speak more directly to that audience. Confirm your availability to meet the April 7th deadline. Applications without examples and the homepage question answered will not be reviewed.

title: Healthcare Business Cold Caller
description:
We are seeking a confident and results-driven Cold Caller to support our healthcare brokerage team by generating new seller leads. In this role, you will conduct outbound calls to healthcare agency owners using publicly available directories such as the CDPH website. Your primary objective is to introduce our brokerage services, identify potential sellers, and qualify leads for our broker.



This position requires strong communication skills, persistence, and the ability to handle objections professionally. You will receive structured training, scripts, and ongoing support to ensure you understand our services, target market, and calling process.



This is an ideal opportunity for someone with B2B cold calling experience who wants to grow long-term in sales and lead generation within a specialized healthcare industry niche.



This role is focused on quality conversations and uncovering real opportunities, not just dialing numbers.

You will work closely with our team and receive structured training, scripts, and ongoing guidance to ensure you understand the market, messaging, and qualification process.



Key Responsibilities:

Use the CDPH website and provided healthcare directories to identify qualified agency owners to contact

Conduct outbound cold calls to introduce our brokerage services clearly and professionally

Identify agency owners who may be considering selling now or in the near future

Thoroughly qualify potential sellers (license status, revenue size, payer mix, timeline, motivation, expectations)

Ask strategic questions to uncover real selling intent, not just curiosity

Confidently handle basic objections and redirect conversations toward value

Set well-qualified follow-up calls or appointments for our broker

Enter detailed, accurate notes into the CRM immediately after each call

Keep the CRM organized and updated with clear lead status and next steps

Provide consistent daily activity and performance updates



Qualifications:

Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or B2B outbound sales

Strong English communication skills with a clear and confident speaking voice

Ability to build quick rapport and ask strategic qualifying questions

Comfortable handling objections and navigating rejection professionally

Detail-oriented and disciplined with accurate note-taking

Experience using CRM systems and maintaining organized lead records

Self-motivated and results-driven, not just activity-driven

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Available to work during U.S. business hours 

Experience in business brokerage, real estate, or healthcare is a strong plus

To make sure you’ve read this entire job post carefully, please use this exact subject line when applying:

“Your Name – HBB Cold Call” Ex. “Ralph - HBB Cold Call”



How to Apply

To apply, please send the following:

A 2–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself and answering:

 • Your experience with cold calling or B2B outreach

 • How you handle rejection

 • Your biggest cold calling achievement

Your updated resume

title: Content Strategist & Researcher (Finance/Tax)
description:
The Mission

With a combined audience of 1.3 million followers, Gavintalkstaxes is the go-to source for making complex tax strategies accessible and entertaining. We are looking for a brilliant Content Strategist & Researcher who can hunt down the latest IRS updates, viral financial trends, and "tax loopholes" and translate them into high-performing short-form video scripts (Reels, TikTok, Shorts).



What You’ll Do

Trend Forecasting: Monitor tax law changes, IRS newsroom updates, and trending financial topics across X 
), Reddit, and TikTok before they hit the mainstream.



Deep-Dive Research: Fact-check tax strategies to ensure 100?curacy. You’ll be the bridge between "tax professional" and "viral creator."



Script Engineering: Write hooks that stop the scroll and scripts that maintain high retention. You aren't just writing captions; you’re architecting views.



Content Mapping: Manage the content calendar to ensure a balance of educational "evergreen" content and rapid-response news.



Performance Analysis: Dig into the analytics to figure out why a video hit 5M views or flopped at 50k, and adjust the strategy accordingly.



Who You Are

The Researcher: You actually enjoy reading IRS bulletins or court cases to find the "hidden gems" that save people money.



The Strategist: You understand that a video about Section 179 isn't just about the tax code—it’s about the "hook" of buying a G-Wagon.



Short-Form Native: You live on Reels/TikTok/Shorts. You know the current sounds, pacing, and visual styles that are winning right now.



Hyper-Organized: You can manage multiple projects and deadlines without breaking a sweat.



Requirements

Proven experience as a Content Strategist or Researcher for a major creator (100k+ followers) or a financial media brand.



Strong understanding of US Tax Law or Personal Finance (Professional certification like EA or CPA is a massive plus, but not required if your research skills are elite).



Portfolio of scripts or content ideas that have resulted in significant reach/engagement.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

s and multi-touch sequences

etings

Excellent written communication skills



Experience running LinkedIn outreach and
 sequences

mbers

title: Project Manager
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based digital marketing agency looking for a skilled
 Ads Specialist to manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns for multiple clients.



Your primary responsibility will be creating, managing, and optimizing
 and Instagram ad campaigns that generate leads for small and medium sized businesses.



This role requires someone who understands performance marketing, data analysis, and campaign optimization. We are not looking for someone who just boosts posts. We need someone who understands how to build, test, and scale real campaigns.



Responsibilities



Create and manage
 and Instagram advertising campaigns

Build campaigns, ad sets, and ads inside Meta Ads Manager

Conduct audience research and targeting

Launch and optimize lead generation campaigns

Monitor daily performance and make optimization decisions

Perform A/B testing on creatives, audiences, and copy

Analyze campaign data and improve ROI

Track CPL, CTR, CPC, and conversion performance

Report campaign results and improvements weekly

Coordinate with our internal team on strategy and creative



Requirements



Strong experience with
 Ads Manager

Experience running lead generation campaigns

Understanding of campaign structure and scaling strategies

Ability to analyze data and make optimization decisions

Good written English communication

Experience running ads for agencies

Understanding of landing pages and conversion optimization



Compensation



Monthly salary based on experience



This position has long term growth potential with opportunities to manage larger ad budgets and additional client accounts as performance improves.

title: Client Onboarding Specialist
description:
KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.



The Onboarding Specialist is responsible for ensuring a smooth transition when a new association begins management services. Their tasks are front-loaded and focused on gathering, organizing, and setting up essential information for the Community Management Team for effective oversight. Onboarding responsibilities end once the setup tasks are completed, and the day-to-day management is fully transferred to the Property Manager (CAM) and Assistant Property Manager (ACAM).



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Data Collection: Gather association documents from the outgoing manager or board for onboarding.

- Vendor Coordination: Distribute vendor packets with billing updates, VIVE registration, and invoice procedures.

- Board Information: Compile board member contact details and provide regular transition updates.

- Community Welcome: Send welcome communications covering payments, contacts, and emergency procedures.

- Setup & Configuration: Initiate VIVE setup and notify the after-hours team. Set up utilities, insurance, and compliance registrations. Configure assessments, fees, and Condo Certs. Upload key documents to the system.

- File Management: Store all onboarding files in SharePoint under the appropriate folder.

- Billing Oversight (First 2 Months): Ensure accurate receipt and processing of vendor bills.

- Post-Transition: Coordinate reserve transfers and close-out tasks. Enter homeowner balances, review final financials, and arrange delivery of physical assets. Special Projects: Support additional projects as assigned.



Benefits: HMO and PTOs after 90 days.



Working conditions:

- Candidate must be able to work from 9 am to 5 pm EST.

- Comfortable working with Hubstaff.



If you have the experience, and if this opportunity interests you, here is how to apply:



1. Please check out website:

 attachment of your updated resume in PDF format (NO LINKS, please).

4. Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Client Onboarding Specialist - your name.



*Applicants who will not follow instructions will be automatically rejected without notice.

* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: B2B Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Fleet Outreach – DOT Medical Exams) – Trial Project
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a confident B2B cold caller / appointment setter to help us contact companies and schedule onsite DOT medical exam days for commercial drivers.



This role will begin as a short-term pilot project (3–4 weeks) to test an outbound outreach system.



If the campaign performs well and exam days are being scheduled successfully, there will be an opportunity to continue in a long-term role with increased hours and bonuses.



?



About Us



We provide FMCSA-compliant DOT medical examinations for commercial drivers and specialize in onsite fleet certification days.



Instead of sending drivers individually to clinics, companies can schedule a driver certification day so all drivers complete their DOT physicals onsite in a few hours.



Our service helps companies:



• keep drivers compliant

• reduce driver downtime

• simplify DOT compliance



We work with companies that employ CDL drivers across the Orlando area.



?



Your Responsibilities



You will be provided with a list of companies and will:



• Call companies to determine if they employ CDL drivers

• Ask for the fleet manager / safety manager / HR manager

• Introduce our onsite DOT medical exam services

• Determine the number of drivers in the fleet

• Send follow-up
s when requested

• Schedule fleet exam days on our calendar

• Track outreach and follow-ups in a spreadsheet



The goal is to schedule fleet exam days for companies with 10–30 drivers.



?



Expected Activity



• 80–120 calls per day

• 400–600 calls per week

• Identify companies with CDL drivers

• Schedule fleet exam days when interest is confirmed



?



Project Duration



Initial pilot project:



3–4 weeks.



If the outreach campaign is successful and exam days are being scheduled consistently, the position may transition into a long-term role with additional hours and bonus incentives.



?



Requirements



We are specifically looking for someone who has experience in:



• B2B cold calling

• appointment setting

• lead generation

• sales development (SDR)



You must have:



• strong spoken English

• confident phone presence

• reliable internet connection

• quiet work environment



Experience calling US businesses is strongly preferred.



Call center experience is a plus.



?



Compensation



Hourly compensation will be discussed with candidates based on experience and expectations.



Performance bonuses will also be available for successfully scheduled fleet exam days.



Estimated hours during pilot phase:



20–30 hours per week.



?



Important Instructions for Applicants



To be considered, please include the following:



A 30-second voice recording introducing yourself.



A short written answer to this question:



“How would you approach a company to schedule an onsite DOT medical exam day for their drivers?”



Include the word “COMPLIANCE” at the beginning of your application so we know you read the full job description.



Applications without these requirements will not be considered.



?



Interview Process



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to:



• participate in audio interview

• complete a 5-minute mock call scenario



?



Interview Questions



Candidates who reach the interview stage will be asked questions such as:



“How do you handle a situation where the person answering the phone says they are not interested and tries to end the call quickly?”



“What questions would you ask to determine whether a company is a good candidate for scheduling a fleet exam day?”



“Tell us about a time you successfully booked appointments through cold calling.”



?



Final Step



When applying, please also tell us:



“What hourly rate are you expecting for this role?”

title: Shopify Developer for Website Creation
description:
We are looking for a skilled Shopify Expert to help us launch a new standalone e-commerce site for our flagship flagpole products. We have the foundation ready and need a professional to execute the build quickly and efficiently.



This is a contract-based role with a tight deadline, but for the right candidate, this could lead to ongoing work across our other e-commerce marketplaces and brands.



The Project



We are spinning off a dedicated Shopify store. We will provide the Theme, Images, and Product Data. Your role is to take these assets and build a high-converting, structurally sound website.



Key Responsibilities



Site Construction: Fully set up and configure the provided Shopify theme.



Optimization: Ensure the site is fast, mobile-responsive, and SEO-friendly.



Structure & Navigation: Organize collections, menus, and footer navigation for an intuitive user experience.



Implementation: Enact all necessary Shopify changes, including app integrations including Judgeme



Quality Assurance: Test all links, buttons, and the checkout flow to ensure a bug-free launch.



Requirements



Proven Shopify Experience: Deep understanding of the Shopify admin, Liquid (if needed for minor tweaks), and theme customization.



Speed & Reliability: We need a quick turnaround on this project. Please only apply if you can commit the hours immediately.



Attention to Detail: Ability to structure a site logically without constant oversight.



Communication: Fluent English and the ability to provide regular status updates via
/ Teams.



Project Details



Timeline: Immediate start required.



Future Growth: Potential for long-term freelance work managing our other UK and international marketplace stores.



How to Apply



Please send a brief message via OnlineJobs.ph including:



Links to at least 2-3 Shopify stores you have personally built or optimized.



Your earliest available start date.



Your estimated timeframe for a standard site setup once all assets are provided.

title: Outbound Sales Development Lead
description:
We are a premier white-label SEO agency serving clients in the UK and US. We’ve built a service, but our outbound engine needs a specialized architect. We aren’t looking for a basic "cold caller". We are looking for the person who builds the outbound system and runs it.



You will be responsible for designing, launching, and managing our end-to-end outbound sales process. Your goal is to consistently generate 10-15 high-quality discovery meetings per month for our Director.



What You’ll Own:



System Architecture: Auditing our current tools and suggesting/implementing a modern stack.

Strategy & Targeting: Identifying high-intent lead lists, segmenting niches, and crafting personalized offers.

Execution: Handling the full "top of funnel" cycle: Cold
 sequences, LinkedIn social selling, and cold calling.

Optimization: Constantly analyzing open rates, reply rates, and meeting-set ratios. You will be expected to pivot strategies and rewrite copy based on data, not just "trying harder".

Meeting Hand-off: Qualifying prospects to ensure they meet our "Ideal Customer Profile" (ICP) before they hit the Director’s calendar.



The Ideal Profile



The "Builder" Mindset: You have successfully set up outbound systems from scratch for other B2B or Agency clients. You know which software works and why.

Data-Driven: You don’t just report "calls made"; you report on conversion trends and ROI.

Independent: You don't need a script handed to you. You write the script, test it, and improve it.

SEO/Marketing Fluency: You understand the nuances of SEO and marketing. You can speak the language of marketing directors and agency owners. (not required)



Requirements

Experience in outbound sales/SDR roles, specifically for B2B agencies or SaaS.

Proven track record of hitting 10+ meetings/month in a high-ticket service environment.

Expertise in Sales Stack Management (CRM,
 Deliverability, Lead Scraping).

Flawless written and spoken English (UK/US market nuance is essential).



Why Join Us?



Autonomy: We trust your expertise. If you say we need a specific tool to win, we listen.

Growth: You are the first dedicated hire for this department. Success here leads to leadership opportunities as we scale.

High Reward: A competitive base salary with a commission structure that rewards closed deals.

description:
We are looking for EXPERIENCED Video Editors / Graphics Designers 



MAKE SURE TO WATCH THIS VIDEO OR YOU WILL MISS STUFF!





One of the major services we offer to our clients is doing video editing services. We are looking for people who have the ART and the EYE of video editing.



Editing is an art, we can teach the technicals of how to do the sounds and the effects and all of that BUT we can NOT teach the art so that is something you MUST have.



What will you be editing?



90% of the time you will be taking raw video footage and then editing it into reels for TT and IG and FB shorts.



Examples:

title: Personal & Business Assistant
description:
About the Role



Strong Arm Consulting is seeking a highly capable Executive Assistant to act as the founder’s primary operational support and gatekeeper.



This role goes beyond typical virtual assistant duties. The Executive Assistant will serve as the first point of contact between the founder and clients, employees, contractors, and outside parties. They will help manage communications, operations, scheduling, hiring logistics, and day-to-day business needs.



The right candidate will be proactive, organized, confident communicating with people, and comfortable taking ownership of tasks without constant direction.



This position requires someone who is flexible and capable of handling whatever operational needs arise throughout the day.



?



Key Responsibilities



Communication & Gatekeeping

 • Serve as the primary point of contact for incoming communication

 • Answer and return calls, texts, and
s

 • Determine which matters require the founder’s attention

 • Handle routine matters independently

 • Ensure the founder only receives communication that truly requires their involvement



?



Client Management

 • Communicate with tax clients and credit clients

 • Assist clients with basic questions and document collection

 • Schedule consultations and appointments

 • Follow up with clients regarding outstanding documents or requests

 • Maintain professional communication with all clients



?



Calendar & Time Management

 • Fully manage the founder’s calendar

 • Schedule meetings, calls, interviews, and appointments

 • Protect focused work time

 • Coordinate scheduling across different responsibilities



?



Hiring & Recruiting Support

 • Coordinate hiring processes

 • Review applicants

 • Schedule and conduct initial employee interviews

 • Present qualified candidates to the founder

 • Assist with onboarding logistics for new hires



?



Business Operations Support

 • Help manage day-to-day business operations

 • Assist with organization of systems and workflows

 • Communicate with contractors and tea
mbers

 • Track ongoing tasks and operational priorities



?



Financial Organization

 • Track incoming payments and expenses

 • Maintain weekly summaries of financial activity

 • Organize receipts and documentation

 • Assist with general budgeting oversight (not accounting)



?



Administrative & Organizational Work

 • Maintain organized digital files

 • Manage documents and records

 • Send reminders and follow-ups

 • Assist with project coordination



?



Personal Assistance

 • Schedule personal appointments when necessary

 • Assist with travel planning

 • Coordinate logistical matters that help the founder remain focused on high-priority work



?



Flexible Operational Support



This role requires someone who can step in and assist with whatever responsibilities are necessary at the time to keep the business running efficiently.



The Executive Assistant should be comfortable adapting to changing priorities and helping solve problems as they arise.



?



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is:

 • Extremely organized

 • Proactive and reliable

 • Comfortable communicating with clients and professionals

 • Capable of making decisions and prioritizing tasks

 • Skilled at managing schedules and logistics

 • Professional, discreet, and trustworthy

 • Able to work independently without constant supervision



?



Requirements

 • Availability Monday – Friday, 10 AM – 6 PM Eastern Time

 • Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

 • Reliable internet connection

 • Experience in executive assistance, operations support, or administrative management preferred



?



Role Importance



This position is a key operational role within the company. The Executive Assistant will work closely with the founder and play a major part in maintaining organization, communication, and operational efficiency as the business grows.



?



Compensation



Compensation will be discussed based on experience.



?



Application Instructions



Please submit:

 • A brief introduction about yourself

 • Your experience in executive assistance or operations support

 • Examples of systems, software, or tools you have used

title: VA - Phone Caller + Text
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB POST BEFORE SUBMITTING AN APPLICATION **



About Us



At BRLandings, we’re on a mission to revolutionize land investment across the United States. We’re a dynamic team of real estate professionals passionate about identifying, acquiring, and selling prime land parcels. Join us in shaping the future of land investment and development!



Role + Mission



As a Lead Qualification Representative, you will be the cornerstone of our acquisitions process, responsible for evaluating and qualifying incoming leads. This position is crucial in ensuring we pursue the most promising land opportunities and contributes significantly to the growth and success of our acquisitions department.



Who We Are Looking For



The ideal candidate is a driven, detail-oriented professional with a proven track record in lead qualification and relationship building. You are an excellent communicator with a “hunter-style” personality, thriving in a fast-paced environment where your efforts directly impact the company’s success. You’re comfortable navigating potentially challenging situations and are motivated by the opportunity to grow into negotiation and closing roles.



Responsibilities & Expectations



- Demonstrate exceptional phone skills to engage with potential sellers and gather crucial information

- Utilize and manage our CRM system to track leads, interactions, and property details

- Conduct thorough lead qualification, including online property research and map building

- Build strong relationships and trust with sellers through clear, empathetic communication

- Analyze property information to determine suitability for purchase based on company criteria

Future Growth Opportunities: Negotiate deals and close land acquisitions.



Experience: Preferably 2+ years of experience as a VA, calling leads, and real estate industry. Not required but preferred.



Required Experience & Skills



- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

- Proven experience with CRM systems and data management

- Strong negotiation and sales skills

- Ability to build trust and relationships quickly in a professional setting



If you feel like you're a good fit for this position, please make and AUDIO or VIDEO APPLICATION and upload to dropbox, google drive, or other cloud platforms and answer the following questions:



1. What is your past experience?

2. Is graveyard shift okay with you? We operate on Central Time Zone.

3. Have you worked as a real estate lead generation rep before?

4. What is your home situation like?

- Home office

- Computer

- Internet Speed

- Distractions (children, family, etc.)

5. Are you available immediately for full-time work?

6. We start pay anywhere from $4-$7/hour based on your experience. Is that ok?



* Put a link to the audio or video file in your applications *



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LINK TO AN AUDIO FILE WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.

title: Part-Time Photoshop & AI Image Editor (Interior / Wallpaper Visualisation)
description:
I am looking for a talented part-time Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines with strong Photoshop skills to help create realistic interior images for my wallpaper website.



The role involves placing my wallpaper designs into beautiful interior room images so they appear as though they were professionally photographed in a real home.



Attention to detail and realism are extremely important. The finished images should look completely natural — correct lighting, perspective, shadows and texture.



This is not basic graphic design work. Strong Photoshop compositing skills are essential.



This role will begin at 10 hours per week with potential for more work as the business grows.







You will be responsible for:



• Applying my wallpaper designs onto walls in supplied interior images

• Ensuring correct perspective, lighting, shadows and texture

• Creating three image types for each design:



Full room image (showing the wall in the room)



Cropped composition image



Close-up texture shot



Each wallpaper design may have multiple colourways, so the same room image will need to be adapted for each version.



Additional tasks may include:



• Adding styling elements to scenes when required

(example: add a cream flokati rug in the foreground, or a large hanging plant beside the sofa)



• Preparing images for website use

• Creating product pages in WordPress using the images

• Creating social media images or ads using the finished visuals

• Posting content to social media platforms



Skills Required



Essential



• Advanced Adobe Photoshop skills

• Experience with photo compositing and realistic image editing

• Strong eye for interior styling and realism

• Ability to match lighting, shadows and perspective



Preferred but not required



• Experience using AI image tools

• Experience with WordPress product pages

• Experience creating social media graphics or ads



Work Hours



•10 hours per week to start

• Flexible working hours

• Potential for ongoing long-term work



Paid Trial Task



Short-listed applicants will be given a paid test task.



This will involve:



• Applying a wallpaper tile to a wall in a supplied interior image

• Creating a finished, realistic image suitable for my website

• Potentially adding styling elements to the scene



Payment will be provided for this test task.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Examples of Photoshop compositing work (interiors preferred)

Please send one example PSD showing your layers



Examples of before/after edits if available



Your experience with WordPress



Any experience using AI image tools



Your hourly rate



Answer this question- If wallpaper is added to a wall in Photoshop, what are the three things that make it look realistic?



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



Please include the word “Wallpaper” in the subject line so I know you have read the full job description.

title: E-Commerce Bookkeeping & Financial Organization VA (Long-Term)
description:
Compensation & Hours: $100/month starting (based on experience, with increases based on performance). Approximately 15 hours per month.This is a long-term role for someone who is extremely organized and detail-oriented.



About Our Company



We are an e-commerce company that sells automotive wheels (rims) online.



We primarily sell through eBay and Amazon and work with suppliers, freight companies, and warehouses (3PL) in the United States.



Our business operates in both USD and CAD, and we manage:



• inventory purchases

• marketplace sales

• shipping & logistics

• advertising expenses

• warehouse / 3PL costs



We are looking for someone to help keep our financial records and bookkeeping systems organized and accurate.



This is a long-term position, not short-term work. If you perform well and maintain strong organization, compensation will increase as the company grows.



Important



This role requires extreme organization and attention to detail.



Our business handles inventory purchases, marketplace sales, shipping expenses, advertising costs, and warehouse logistics. Because of this, our financial records must remain clean, structured, and organized at all times.



We cannot work with individuals who are sloppy, careless, or disorganized with financial information.



If you enjoy building organized systems and maintaining accurate financial records, this could be a great long-term role.



Main Responsibilities



Your role is to ensure our financial records remain organized, accurate, and easy to understand.



Responsibilities include:



• organizing invoices and financial documents

• maintaining bookkeeping records

• tracking marketplace sales and fees

• recording and categorizing business expenses

• reconciling marketplace payouts with bank deposits

• maintaining an inventory purchase tracking sheet

• preparing a simple monthly financial summary



You will also help maintain a structured document system for items such as:



• supplier invoices

• inventory purchases

• shipping invoices

• warehouse / 3PL invoices

• advertising charges

• software subscriptions

• contractor payments



Inventory Tracking



Because we sell physical products, we maintain an inventory purchase sheet.



You will record:



• product SKU

• supplier

• quantity purchased

• cost per unit

• purchase date



This helps track inventory value and cost of goods sold (COGS).



Experience working with inventory-based businesses is highly preferred.



Preferred Tools / Experience



Experience with industry-standard ecommerce bookkeeping tools is preferred, such as:



• cloud accounting software (QuickBooks or similar)

• Google Sheets / Excel

• ecommerce accounting integrations (A2X or similar)

• marketplace reports from eBay or Amazon



Requirements



We are looking for someone who is:



• extremely organized

• detail-oriented

• reliable and consistent

• comfortable working with spreadsheets

• able to follow structured systems



Strong Google Sheets / Excel skills are important.



Experience with bookkeeping for inventory-based businesses is strongly preferred.



Application Instructions



Please include relevant experience related to this role in your application, such as:



• bookkeeping or financial tracking experience

• experience working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

• experience with inventory-based businesses

• experience working with ecommerce or marketplace businesses

• experience using accounting or bookkeeping software



The more relevant detail you provide about your experience with bookkeeping, financial organization, and inventory tracking, the better.



Long-Term Opportunity



We are looking for someone who wants to work with us long-term and grow with the company.



If you help keep our financial systems clean and organized, your compensation will increase and you will be rewarded as the company grows.



Application Confirmation



To confirm you read this entire job post, include the phrase:



“WHEELS For Sale”



in the first line of your application.

title: HR Generalist
description:
Join Our Remote Accounting Team!

We are a fast-growing, boutique outsourced accounting firm supporting high-growth e-commerce and service-based businesses. We’ve been behind the scenes helping some of the most exciting DTC brands scale with confidence through expert bookkeeping, financial systems, and strategic insights.



We are a remote-first company with a collaborative, client-first culture — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.



About the Role

We are looking for a hands-on HR Generalist who thrives in a startup environment and is excited to help build the HR function from the ground up. This role goes beyond day-to-day HR support — you will play a key role in setting up foundational HR processes, shaping people practices, and supporting the growth of our teams as the company scales.



As a young and fast-growing company, growth opportunities are significant. You will have the chance to help build teams, influence culture, and design systems that will evolve alongside the business. While the team currently operates in a distributed setup, the role is designed to support both remote and future on-site tea
mbers.



You will work closely with the HR and Talent Acquisition Manager to establish strong HR frameworks, ensure compliance, and deliver a positive tea
mber experience across the U.S. and the Philippines.



Your Responsibilities

** Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

- Manage full-cycle recruitment especially for finance and accounting roles, including Bookkeepers, Senior Bookkeepers, Accountants, and related positions.

- Source, screen, and interview candidates across the U.S. and the Philippines.

- Partner with hiring managers to clarify role needs and support workforce planning as teams grow.

- Build and continuously improve recruitment processes suitable for a startup environment.

- Coordinate interviews, reference checks, and offer processes.

- Maintain the applicant tracking system and ensure a smooth, professional candidate experience.

mber Relations & Benefits Management

title: $2/hr + $20–$100/lead = ~$11/hr: Real Estate Motivated Seller Lead Generator
description:
Real Estate Motivated Seller Lead Generator

100% Remote | Unlimited Earning Potential

U.S. Real Estate Investment Marketing Company



Location: 100% Remote — Work From Anywhere. Part-time, and Full-time is welcomed.

Pay Structure: $20–$100 USD per qualified lead submitted (no cap)

Hourly Base: $2/hr

Average Earnings: ~$11/hr for reps submitting just 2 leads/day, 5 days/week

Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly via direct transfer

Start Date: ASAP



About the Company:

We are the highest-paying real estate investment marketing company that generates motivated seller leads for real estate investors across the United States. We work fast, we value accuracy, and we pay immediately upon lead approval. We are a small, lean team — no bureaucracy, no waiting around. If you perform, you get paid and you grow with us.



Why This Role Stands Out:

No hourly cap. No income ceiling. You earn $22–$100 per qualified lead with zero limit on how many you can submit. The only thing limiting your income is how many leads you generate.



Real earning example: A rep submitting just 2 leads per day at our average payout of $40/lead earns $80/day — that is approximately $11/hr on a standard 40-hour work week, working 5 days a week. Reps who submit more leads or generate higher-quality leads that land in the $50–$100 range earn substantially more. Our top individual VA makes >$2,500/week.



What You Will Be Doing:

Your job is straightforward:

• Generate motivated seller leads across the United States using any legal method you choose (cold calling,
 outreach,
 ads, SEO, direct mail, referrals, etc.)

• Qualify each lead to our specifications — the seller must verbally confirm on a recorded line (1) they are interested in selling and (2) they are willing to have someone view the property within 14 days OR speak with an investor by phone within 7 days

• Verify the lead is not a duplicate already in our system before submitting

• Submit the lead through our internal dashboard along with a call recording and qualifying information

• Receive instant payout upon lead approval



That is the entire workflow. Generate. Qualify. Verify. Submit. Get paid.



How You Generate Leads Is Up to You

We do not tell you how to find leads. This role is ideal for people who specialize in one or more of the following:

• Cold calling

•
 outreach

•
 / social media advertising

• SEO or content marketing

• Direct mail

• Referral networks

• Any other legal outbound or inbound method



Important: You are responsible for sourcing and funding your own leads list, dialer, and any other tools you use. We do not provide dialers. We do sell cold call lists at cost if you need them — contact us for pricing. We do not mark up the list cost.



Compensation Structure:

Base + Commission

Lead Payout Range: $22–$100 USD per qualified lead (based on quality and lead type)

Average Payout: $40 per lead

Payout Cap: None — unlimited submissions, and unlimited income

Payout Timing: Instant upon lead approval

Payment Method: Bi-weekly direct transfer



Team / Affiliate Program

You can bring reps on under you and earn a lifetime commission on every lead your team submits. You set the split with your sub-reps (for example, 50/50, 60/40 — you pick ) and simply notify us of the agreed-upon split when onboarding them. We manage all payroll for your team. You do not have to chase payments or manage the administrative side — we handle it entirely. This is ideal for:

• Recruiters

• Affiliate marketers

• Sales team leads or managers

• Anyone who wants to build a passive income stream from team production



Quality Requirements and Account Standing

We pay well because we expect quality. Here is how quality is measured and what happens if it drops:



88%+ Quality Rate (2-week average): No restrictions. Unlimited lead submissions.



Below 88% Quality Rate (2-week average): Account is capped at a fixed number of lead submissions per day until quality rate returns above 88%.



Below 80% Quality Rate (2-week average): Account is paused and placed on a 60-day probation period.



Lead Refund / Clawback Policy

We take lead quality seriously. Accounts can be banned if leads are found to be invalid. This mirrors the industry-standard refund criteria. Leads are subject to commission clawback for any of the following reasons:

• Property is actively listed on the MLS at the time of submission

• Property has not been listed for the past 12 months

• Lead is a duplicate already in our system

• Property is a mobile home on leased land

• Lead was submitted by a wholesaler, not the actual property owner

• Property is vacant land

• Property is non-residential (commercial, industrial, agricultural, etc.)

• Address is invalid, non-existent, or cannot be verified

• Contact information (phone/email) is fake or entirely incorrect

• Lead is confirmed spam or bot-submitted

• Seller confirms they never requested an offer and have no intent to sell

• Contact is not the property owner or an authorized representative

• Lead falls outside our active acquisition markets

• Seller explicitly states they are not selling, confirmed on follow-up

• Seller has high price expectations (more than 135% of market value)

+ This includes sellers who were never thinking about selling but would sell for a excessively high asking price.



Submitting consistently poor-quality or fraudulent leads will result in permanent account termination.



Tools and Technology

Get cash-back on technology you are already using when you are working with us!

Calling Platform: Your own — you are responsible for your dialer and phone system.

-Get a discounted Kixie dialer here: 
/m2sr5mhgu08h

-SmrtPhone, ReadyMode, and more!

Leads List: Your own — we sell lists at cost if needed; we do not provide lists for free.

-Get a discounted PropStream/BatchDialer account here: 
/rizzly/

-Datasift, and more!



How to Apply — Read Carefully

We review every application carefully. Incomplete applications are automatically disqualified. To be considered, you MUST submit all of the following:



Required Application Materials

1. Your resume or verified work history (PDF preferred)

2. A voice or video recording (2–4 minutes) answering ALL THREE questions below — text-only responses will not be reviewed

3. A written statement at the end of your application confirming: "I have read and understand the compensation structure, quality requirements, refund policy, and account standing terms outlined in this job posting."



Video / Voice Recording Questions (Answer All Three)

Question 1: Walk me through exactly how you plan to generate motivated seller leads. What is your strategy, what tools will you use, and why do you believe your approach will work?



Question 2: Describe a time you generated leads or found potential customers for any product or service. What did you do, what was the result, and what did you learn?



Question 3: A homeowner says they are interested in selling but won't be ready for 6 months. How do you categorize this lead? What do you do with it? Does it qualify for submission?



Disqualification Notice

Applications submitted without a recording, without the written confirmation statement, or that do not answer all three questions will not be reviewed — no exceptions.



We are a small, fast-moving team.

We value accuracy, reliability, and honesty above all else.

If that describes you — and you are ready to earn based on results — we want to hear from you.

title: Customer Service Representative with Property Management Experience
description:

The Nabo Group is looking for 3 Customer Service Representatives with Property Management experience for our growing team, who enjoys solving problems, responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable to join our fun/hard working team. You must have excellent communication skills.



As a Customer Service Representative, you will play a critical role in fostering positive relationships with our clients and ensuring that their maintenance needs are met effectively and efficiently. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and help maintain our reputation for excellence in the maintenance industry.



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Client Communication: Act as the primary point of contact for clients, providing exceptional customer service and ensuring clear and professional communication. Respond to client inquiries via phone,
, and online platforms.

- Maintenance Coordination: Work closely with the maintenance team to schedule, track, and coordinate maintenance services, ensuring timely and accurate completion of tasks.

- Issue Resolution: Address and resolve client complaints or concerns regarding maintenance services in a timely, professional, and empathetic manner.

- Client Scheduling & Follow-Up: Schedule appointments for maintenance services and follow up with clients’ post-service to ensure satisfaction and gather feedback.

- Database Management: Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of client interactions, maintenance schedules, and work orders within the company’s CRM system.

- Problem Solving & Troubleshooting: Provide quick solutions to client issues and coordinate any necessary follow-up or additional service visits.

- Collaboration: Work closely with field technicians, supervisors, and other tea
mbers to ensure the smooth flow of maintenance services from start to finish.

- Service Knowledge: Stay informed about the company’s maintenance offerings and ensure clients are fully aware of the services available to them.

- Reporting & Documentation: Document client interactions, service requests, and resolutions. Generate reports to track the progress and outcomes of maintenance activities.

- Performs other duties that may be assigned from time to time.



Desired Qualifications:

- College degree or equivalent work experience.

- Experience with Real Estate is a plus.

- At least 6 months of experience working remotely.

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent interpersonal skills, problem solving, and analytical skills.

- Strong customer service skills.

- Ability to multi-task and prioritize.

- Reliable and dependable.

- Excellent problem-solving skills.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure.

- Attention to details and highly organized.

- Great time management skills.

- Capable of keeping control of the call even when the customer is angry.

- Ethical and trustworthy.

- Great at relationship-building.

- Ability to work under minimal supervision.

- Friendly and fair.



Working conditions:

- The schedules are permanent and assigned by the department’s Manager. Schedules might change eventually depending on demand.

- Must have own work equipment that is not older than 2 years.

- Internet speed must be no lower than 150 Mbps.

- Must have backup internet for emergencies (no lower than 100 Mbps) and a place to relocate during power or internet outages.

title: Urgent Hiring: Virtual Executive Assistant — Executive Support for B2B eCommerce Consultant Founder
description:
Urgent Hiring: Virtual Executive Assistant — Executive Support for B2B eCommerce Consultant Founder (FEMALE)



Job Code: AJH-VEA01

Location: Remote

Type: Part-Time (4 hours per day, Monday to Friday)

Schedule: U.S. Morning Hours (Pacific Time) — 7:00 AM – 11:00 AM (PT) | 10:00 PM – 2:00 AM (Manila time)



Monthly Rate: $560 / $7 per hour



About the Role:

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Executive Assistant to support a seasoned B2B eCommerce consultant and founder.

This is a high-trust, high-impact role focused on helping the founder stay organized, maintain follow-up discipline, and bring structure to daily operations.

We are looking for someone who can think ahead, learn quickly, and operate comfortably in a fast-moving, founder-led environment.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Inbox & Communication Management

 • Monitor and triage multiple inboxes

 • Flag priority messages

 • Draft professional replies

 • Maintain follow-up discipline so nothing slips



2. Calendar & Meeting Coordination

 • Manage calendar flow and scheduling

 • Protect focus time

 • Coordinate meetings across time zones

 • Prepare basic meeting briefs when needed



3. HubSpot & Pipeline Support

 • Maintain contact and deal hygiene

 • Log activities consistently

 • Help maintain consistency in lead flow



4. Follow-Up & Execution Support

 • Track action items fro
etings

 • Nudge stakeholders when needed

 • Maintain simple task visibility



5. Research & Briefing Support

 • Conduct B2B research

 • Prepare short summaries or briefs



Minimum Qualifications:

 • Minimum 2 years experience supporting founders or executives

 • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or related field preferred

 • Excellent English communication (C2 level required)

 • Strong organizational and follow-through skills

 • Experience with inbox and calendar management

 • Comfortable learning new tools and systems quickly

 • High level of professionalism and discretion



Preferred Experience

 • HubSpot or CRM experience

 • Experience supporting consultants or B2B teams

 • Sales Navigator familiarity (a plus)

 • Strong AI tool familiarity (ChatGPT or similar)



Required Skills

 • Strong written business communication

 • Excellent attention to detail

 • Calendar and inbox management

 • Task tracking and follow-through

 • Research and information synthesis

 • Tech comfortable and systems oriented



Key Traits We Value

 • Fast learner with high curiosity

 • Proactive communicator

 • Systems thinker

 • Highly reliable and responsive



Tech Requirements

 • Minimum 8GB RAM (16GB preferred)

 • Intel i5 10th gen or newer (or equivalent Ryzen)

 • Reliable high-speed internet

 • Backup internet and power bank strongly preferred

 • Noise-cancelling headset preferred

 • Stable internet and quiet work environment required



What We Offer

 • Long-term, stable client placement

 • Ongoing coaching and support from Vera Outsourcing

 • Structured onboarding and guidance

 • Supportive and professional team environment

 • Potential to transition to full-time as the business grows



How to Apply:

If you meet the qualifications, please submit:

 • Updated resume

 • 1-minute introduction video



Send to: 

Application Deadline: Wednesday, March 11, 2026



Subject line:

Virtual Executive Assistant for B2B eCommerce Consultant Founder — Job Code: AJH-VEA01



Why Join Vera Outsourcing:



At Vera Outsourcing, you are not just another assistant, you become part of a high-caliber team supporting serious founders doing meaningful work.



We invest in our VEAs through structured onboarding, ongoing coaching, and real growth opportunities so you can sharpen your skills and build a long-term career in executive support.



If you are someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and wants to grow alongside high-performing leaders, we would love to meet you!



*Due to the volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you sincerely for your time and interest in joining Vera Outsourcing.



VERA OUTSOURCING

title: SEO Specialist (for real)
description:
Please read everything in order to be considered: 



This is by far the most difficult position to fill.  If I find my "gem", I'll make sure you're happy for years to come as long as I'm happy with your work. My approach is result-driven. Base pay + bonuses based on achieving goals we set together. So if you know for real how to set a target and get there in 3-6 months - this is for you. Yes, we are long-term oriented. Most of the people in my team have been with me for years. And SEO work is pretty simple. It's not rocket science, but yes - there are a lot of basics to know, and also it's important to stay up ot date with trends and algorithms. But it's so easy with all the AI tools.

However, you need to know/learn how to use AI to superpower yourself. Not just give a prompt in the morning and submit output 8 hours later, saying "here is what I worked on today. 



I'm looking for an expert in SEO/AEO. A real one. Please don't waste my time and your application points if you know what SEO stands for or just asked AI to help you with your resume. I'll test you and will quickly determine if you know stuff, or if you read what GPT told you to say in the interview.



We run multiple websites for our e-commerce business. We have a USA-based warehouse with over 13,000 products. Our main website has around 100,000 visitors every month. I'm looking for someone to help me increase it to 200,000 with the same or better conversion rate.

I'll ask you for proven results from your past projects. Not something you find on Google - real ones.  On-page SEO, link building, keyword analysis, AEO, and strategies—you have to be an expert in these.

If you are - please apply and start your message/title "SEO Rockstar". If you don't, I'll assume that you didn't read my description, so the application will be simply archived.

For the right specialist, I'm ready to offer a competitive hourly rate plus result-based bonuses.

Thank you.



P.S. AI suggested salary for this position: 

Experienced level (Ave High): Monthly: approximately $835.00 - $1,025.00 per month (?47,700 - ?58,300 per month) | Hourly: approximately $5.41 per hour (?308 per hour)



I'm adding $1500 because I'm ready to pay that and even more (again, as base + bonuses) for the right candidate who will join our 20+ humans team and take the role of SEO expert.
