title: Project based Web Designer (No Code and Low Code CMS Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail oriented Web Designer with 3+ years of experience designing and building modern websites using no code and low code CMS platforms such as Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor.



This role focuses on creating visually compelling, responsive, and high performing websites with strong UX and UI execution. You will work on business websites, landing pages, and e commerce experiences, translating design ideas into clean, functional digital experiences with minimal custom code.



Role Overview



Project based contract role. Work will be assigned per project depending on client needs and internal project allocation.



Project based contract with an hourly rate starting at $7 per hour, with adjustments based on experience, role fit, and application performance, up to $8 per hour.



Key Responsibilities



Design and build responsive websites using Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor



Customize CMS templates using native tools, drag and drop builders, and light HTML or CSS adjustments



Translate wireframes and mockups from Figma into fully realized website designs



Create user centered layouts optimized for performance, accessibility, and mobile responsiveness



Develop e commerce experiences including product pages, collections, and checkout flows using Shopify and WooCommerce



Maintain consistency with brand guidelines, UI standards, and visual hierarchy



Optimize websites for SEO, site speed, and cross browser compatibility



Collaborate with internal teams or clients to define design requirements and deliver projects



Provide post launch refinements and CMS guidance when needed



Tools and Platforms



Wix Editor and Wix Studio

Squarespace Fluid Engine

Shopify Theme Editor

WordPress with Elementor

Figma

Adobe Creative Suite including Photoshop, Illustrator, and After Effects

Basic HTML and CSS for design enhancements



Qualifications



3+ years of web design experience using no code or low code CMS platforms



Strong portfolio demonstrating modern, responsive web design



Solid understanding of UX and UI principles, visual hierarchy, and responsive design



Experience designing e commerce websites using Shopify or WooCommerce



Comfortable working with CMS tools and performing light HTML or CSS adjustments



Strong attention to detail, communication skills, and ability to manage multiple projects



Nice to Have



Experience implementing branding systems across websites

Familiarity with Google Analytics, heatmap tools, and A B testing

Understanding of WCAG accessibility standards

Experience with motion graphics or web animations using After Effects or Lottie

Ability to recommend CMS platforms based on project needs



Why Join Us



Work on a variety of website projects across industries while building strong CMS and UX expertise. This role offers clear expectations, ownership of design work, and opportunities to grow in web design and digital experience execution.



Important Application Requirements



To be considered for this role, complete and accurate application materials are required.



• A properly completed Web Designer Application Overview document

• Portfolio samples that demonstrate relevant web design and CMS experience



Applications that are incomplete, missing required documents, or do not demonstrate relevant experience will not move forward in the review process.



Apply here:





Please ensure the Web Designer Application Overview is downloaded and fully completed before submitting your application.

title: Amazon Seller Central Account Coordinator
description:
Here’s a quick video sharing why you may want to work with me! 
 



Role Overview:

I’m looking for an exceptional, detail-oriented Account Coordinator to join my equally amazing team. In this role, you’ll be a key member of a cross-functional team, helping ensure the smooth execution of Amazon-related projects that directly support our clients’ success. You’ll collaborate closely with both our overseas point of contact and our U.S.-based manager, providing reliable support while taking full ownership of your responsibilities.



Requirements:

*Must be able to work 20 hours weekly, with the potential to go full-time in the future

*Must be able to work any 4-hour block between 9 AM to 5 PM Mountain Time (US)

*Must have strong written and verbal communication

*Highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities independently

*Must have 1-2 years of experience working with Amazon Seller Central

*Experience in a start-up or other fast-paced, high-growth company is a plus.

*Must have strong problem-solving skills and must be a creative thinker with demonstrated initiative.

*Must have the ability to identify root causes and effectively communicate complex issues cross-functionally.

*Must be able to work autonomously, and manage tasks and timelines efficiently with minimal oversight.

*Must have the ability to accurately execute operating procedures and best practices as defined by the company



What You’ll Do:



Must-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Must Be Proficient In)



These are the tasks the VA needs to handle independently and confidently from day one:



Account Health and Compliance: 

*Monitor the health, account status and listings of client Amazon Seller Central and Vendor Central accounts to ensure optimal performance.

*Conduct root cause analysis for errors and issues as they arise and communicate them effectively across departments

*Manage case logs for listing, inventory, and account health-related issues, providing timely resolution and support.

*Perform regular checks and updates to ensure compliance with Amazon policies and guidelines.

*Communicate with Amazon Seller Support via chat,
, or phone to resolve any issues.

*Monitor product reviews and ratings, proactively escalating low ratings or trends to Account Managers for action

*Maintain and regularly update the Voice of the Customer (VOTC) tracker to monitor product performance insights.



Catalog and Listing Management:

*Assist in maintaining and updating the brand catalog in Seller and Vendor Central using flat files and bulk uploads in Microsoft Excel.

*Optimize product detail pages through content updates and ensure catalog accuracy.

*Manage product listings, from creation to troubleshooting, using flat files and Microsoft Excel

*Upload and manage listing visuals, including A+ Content and thumbnail images, ensuring brand consistency and accuracy

*Write optimized product titles, bullet points, and other copywriting tasks to ensure engaging, high-converting content.



Promotions Support:

*Create and track promotional efforts

*Enroll products in the Subscribe & Save or Vine programs as needed.

*Create weekly Brand Posts, including image editing in Canva (or other similar tools) and craft compelling copy for each post across multiple brands.



Data Collection, Reporting, and Team Collaboration:

*Prepare monthly Virtual Bundles performance reports and support quarterly business recaps.

*Assist with data collection, analysis, and reporting to support Account Managers in achieving client objectives

*Use Microsoft Office and Google Suite for collaboration

*Collaborate with 3P support and the account manager overseeing Luminary brands through
 correspondence.



Nice-to-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Can Learn Over Time)



These tasks are valuable but can be trained on the job:



Executive Support:

*Collaborate with the US-based Account Management team through Slack and Asana

*Continuously learn and stay updated with Amazon's platform changes, policies, and industry trends.

*Use Helium 10 for keyword research



Ready to Apply?

1. Message me with the subject “I'm excited to work with you, Jessica!”

2. Add a link to your resume

3. Indicate your contact
 address



If this doesn’t sound perfect but you love hard work and learning, reach out anyway—there’s likely another chance to join my team!

title: Email Marketing & Design Specialist (Klaviyo + Graphic Design)
description:
About PACHA



PACHA is a fast-growing natural foods brand that produces organic, gluten-free sourdough bread made from sprouted buckwheat. Our products are sold nationwide at retailers such as Whole Foods Market and through our website.

Our mission is to nourish the health of people and the planet with simple, allergen-free food made from regenerative ingredients and packaged in home-compostable materials.

We are a small, fast-moving team looking for a highly organized marketing specialist who can both execute
 campaigns and help improve our
 marketing performance over time.



Role Overview



We are looking for a full-time
 Marketing & Design Specialist to support our marketing team.

This role combines

You will be responsible for building and scheduling

s and retail materials, organizing marketing assets, and helping us continuously improve our

The ideal candidate has experience with Klaviyo, e-commerce

Preferred Experience

 flows

 marketing metrics

What Success Looks Like:



Within the first few months, you will:

 campaigns with minimal supervision

 • Improve the performance of our
 flows through research and testing

 • Help our marketing team execute campaigns efficiently



Work Details

 • Full-time remote role

 • Some overlap with U.S. working hours preferred

 • Long-term opportunity with a growing brand



Quick Trial Task (Required for Consideration)



To help us identify candidates with strong attention to detail and design ability, please complete the following short task.

This task should take no more than 15–20 minutes.



Step 1

Visit 
 and choose one product.

Write 2–3 short bullet points that could be used in an
 marketing campaign for that product and that align with PACHA's brand.



Step 2

Create a simple
 graphic mockup for that product using any design tool.

The graphic should include:

 • a product image

 • a short headline

 • a clean layout suitable for an

 • a desktop and mobile view of the design



Step 3

Submit with your application:

 • the bullet points you wrote

 • the graphic mockup

 • confirmation of your experience using Klaviyo



Applications without the trial task will not be considered. Please include "TT COMPLETE" in the subject line of your application in order to be considered!

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We’re seeking a versatile, detail-oriented Graphic Designer responsible for creating product packaging, user manuals, and a wide range of design assets that support our product and marketing teams.

You will work closely with product development, marketing, and our global suppliers to ensure our design output is beautiful, clear, consistent, and aligned with the Desky brand.



Key Responsibilities



Design product packaging for new and existing SKUs, following brand guidelines.

Create user manuals, instruction sheets, diagrams, and assembly guides.

Collaborate with product developers to refine concepts and translate technical specs into clean, customer-friendly visuals.

Ensure design files are organised, export-ready, and suitable for print production.

Maintain and evolve the Desky brand look-and-feel across all assets.

Support basic day-to-day design needs, including resizing, layout, retouching, and template updates.



Skills & Experience



Proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign essential).

Figma experience for layout, prototyping, or collaborative design workflows.

Experience designing packaging, manuals, diagrams, and technical documentation is a plus

Strong understanding of typography, layout systems, colour, and visual storytelling.

Ability to interpret technical product information and convert it into intuitive visuals.

Excellent attention to detail and organisational skills.

Ability to work efficiently, meet deadlines, and communicate clearly in a collaborative environment.



Who You Are:



A creative problem-solver with a strong eye for detail.

Passionate about elevating customer experience through great design.

Comfortable working in a fast-moving, growing company with a global footprint.

Eager to contribute ideas and help shape the look of a leading ergonomic brand.

A team player who takes ownership and delivers consistently high-quality work.



About Desky



Desky is one of Australia’s fastest-growing ergonomic furniture brands, now expanding rapidly across the USA, Canada, and Europe. We’re known for our innovative standing desks, ergonomic chairs, and workspace accessories that blend premium quality with modern design.



We’re a vibrant, high-performing team that values creativity, ownership, and collaboration. As we continue to grow our global product range—including new peripherals and ergonomic innovations—we’re looking for a talented Graphic Designer to help bring our products to life through exceptional packaging, manuals, and brand visuals.

title: Junior Underwriting Analyst (Tier 1 – Risk)
description:
Role Overview



We are hiring a Junior Underwriting Analyst to assemble complete, accurate, and well-organized underwriting packages for senior risk leadership and the Credit Risk Management Committee.



This is a documentation-heavy, detail-critical role focused on financial statement review, data verification, and underwriting package preparation — not final credit decision-making (at this stage).



Core Responsibilities



Collect and organize underwriting documentation (12–24 months financials, bank data, tax returns, A/R & A/P aging)



Review and interpret balance sheets, P&Ls, and cash flow statements



Calculate and verify key metrics (Revenue growth, EBITDA, Contribution Margin, Debt ratios, Cash runway, ROAS, CAC/LTV)



Ensure data completeness across bank integrations and financial systems



Assemble clean underwriting packets using standardized templates



Coordinate with Account Executives to obtain missing documents



Track package status in CRM tools



Non-Negotiable Requirements



Applicants must have ALL of the following:

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Before you apply, read this carefully.

We run one of the fastest-growing pet brands online.

DTC. Performance-focused. High volume.

And we're looking for a Video Editor who actually knows what they're doing.

Not someone who cuts clips together.

Someone who makes people stop scrolling.

What the job is:

You receive a script. You deliver a scroll-stopping, emotion-driven video ad. Within 24 hours.

That's it. 

What we need from you:

? Strong editing skills (pacing, sound design, motion, storytelling)

? AI tools fluency : you must be actively using AI in your workflow (voiceover, generation, enhancement,.. we don't care which, but you need to know them)

? Consistency. Speed. No excuses.

? Available for weekly projects, long-term

You are NOT a fit if:

? You apply with a generic message

? You've never edited a performance ad before

? You need 3 days to deliver a 60-second video

? You don't use AI tools in your process



The Hiring Process:



Trial Task : 45 to 60 sec video from our script. 24h delivery. Unpaid. This filters out everyone who's not serious.

Paid Project Trial : Full brand video. If it's good, short interview follows.

One-Month Paid Trial : Weekly projects with feedback.

Long-Term Offer : For those who consistently deliver.





ONE MORE THING.

We get a lot of applications.

Most of them are copy-paste. Vague. Useless.

If yours looks like that, we won't even open it.

To apply, your message must follow this exact structure :



Full Name:

Age:

City:

Years of experience in video editing:

AI tools you actively use:

Link to past video ads (not general reels, ad content):

One sentence: why should we pick you over everyone else?

Loom Video (2-3 min, in English, introduce yourself):

If your message doesn't follow this structure exactly, it gets ignored.

We're not harsh. We're just focused.

The right person will love this.

title: Social Media Strategist / Manager
description:
We are a high-performing real estate sales team based in Auckland, New Zealand. We’re looking for an experienced and results-driven Social Media Strategist to join our team and drive growth across our social channels:
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok. 



This is not a “post some stuff and hope for the best” job. We need someone who can develop and execute social media strategies that will build our local audience, drive engagement, create leads, and achieve KPIs such as brand visibility, enquiries, and team recruitment. You must be able to think strategically, analyze data, and optimize campaigns for maximum growth.



Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and execute social media strategies tailored to real estate in Auckland

- Plan, create, and schedule content for multiple platforms 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.)

- Optimize our Meta Business Suite and LinkedIn presence for reach, engagement, and conversion

- Monitor social media trends, insights, and best practices to keep campaigns innovative and competitive

- Analyze performance metrics and provide actionable reports to improve engagement, reach, and lead generation

- Collaborate with the Design team to ensure brand consistency across channels

- Collaborate with the Sales team to produce creative campaigns and initiatives to increase brand awareness and market reach

- Manage advertising campaigns and optimize them for conversions and ROI

- Respond directly to comments and questions on social media posts 



Qualifications:

- At least 3 years of experience as a Social Media Strategist or similar role in real estate

- Demonstrated results in follower growth, content reach, and audience engagement

- Strong marketing background, with knowledge of digital marketing strategies and tools

- Excellent understanding of Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, and LinkedIn algorithms, features, and analytics

- Strong copywriting and storytelling skills in English

- Knowledge of paid advertising campaigns and optimization strategies

- Familiarity with the Auckland real estate market is preferred



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

- Audience growth rate (followers, page likes)

- Post reach and engagement rate

- Lead and enquiry generation through social platforms

- Listings influenced, appraisals booked, and recruitment enquiries

- Weekly/monthly content production consistency

- New campaign ideas and initiative frequency



What We Offer

- Competitive salary based on experience

- Full-time, long-term remote employment with a stable NZ-based company

- Fixed schedule aligned with New Zealand office hours - Monday to Friday, 4:30 AM – 1:00 PM PH time (9:30 AM – 6:00 PM NZ time, with a 30-minute break)

- Collaborative and empowering team environment

- Opportunities for career growth and upskilling



How to Apply:

Please send us the following:

- An updated CV (including links to social media accounts you’ve managed)

- A portfolio or examples of your best-performing content or campaigns

- A short video explaining why you’re the best person for this role. Please mention Harcourts Hoverd & Co by name in your video

title: Business Development Representative
description:
Job Title: Business Development Rep / B2B Appointment Setter

Job Code: MD-B2B-APPT-SETTER

Position Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

Work Days: Monday – Friday





Position overview

We are seeking a highly skilled B2B Appointment Setter to support our outbound sales efforts. The primary focus of this role is to connect with potential clients through cold calling and
 outreach, with the goal of scheduling qualified meetings for our senior sales representatives.



This position is ideal for professionals who are results-driven, proactive, and possess exceptional English communication skills. You’ll be working in a fast-paced, performance-oriented environment where initiative and persistence are highly valued.





Key responsibilities



Conduct outbound cold calls to prospective clients:

 -Make high-volume calls daily to potential business clients across various industries. Calls typically range from 3–6 minutes and aim to introduce the company’s services, identify potential needs, and spark interest in a scheduled consultation.



Execute targeted cold
 outreach campaigns:

 -Develop and send strategic cold
s to complement phone outreach efforts. Follow up promptly on
 responses to nurture leads, provide additional information, and secure confirmed appointments.



Utilize Apollo CRM for lead management:

 -Work within the Apollo platform to manage and track all outreach activities. Keep detailed notes on every contact, call outcome, and follow-up schedule to maintain accurate and organized records of your daily performance.



Engage decision-makers across key industries:

 -Reach out to Safety Managers, HR Managers, and Risk Managers in labor-intensive sectors such as construction, manufacturing, transportation, hospitality, and retail. Understand their business challenges and communicate how our solutions can address their needs effectively.



Qualify and set appointments for senior sales representatives:

 -Identify high-quality leads by assessing interest levels, urgency, and fit with company offerings. Secure appointments for senior closers by presenting value propositions clearly and ensuring leads meet the defined qualification criteria.



Maintain accurate and up-to-date records:

 -Document all outreach activities, call summaries, and client information in the CRM. Monitor personal performance metrics and report progress to supervisors regularly. Ensure data integrity and compliance with company standards.



Collaborate closely with the sales team:

 -Work in alignment with sales executives and team leaders to ensure seamless lead handoffs. Share insights from conversations with prospects to improve sales strategies and enhance team performance.



Stay informed and continuously improve performance:

 -Participate in training sessions, performance reviews, and feedback discussions. Stay updated on company offerings, target markets, and outreach best practices to continually improve efficiency and conversion rates.





Experience requirements

-Fluent English speaker with excellent verbal and written communication skills; minimal accent preferred.

-Prior experience in business development, appointment setting, or outbound sales is highly desirable.

-Strong interpersonal, listening, and persuasion skills.

-Comfortable with high-volume cold calling and handling rejection professionally.

-Experience using Apollo or similar CRM tools is an advantage.

-Highly organized, self-motivated, and goal-oriented with a strong sense of accountability.





How to Apply?

-Send me a google drive link with your resume. make sure it's set to public.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: Virtual Administrator / Appointment Specialist
description:
Virtual Administrator & Appointment Specialist - Empower Lives Through Martial Arts! (Full-Time)



Do you have a passion for helping others achieve their goals? Are you a highly organized, proactive individual with excellent communication skills? Join our team and help us empower lives through martial arts!

We are seeking a dynamic and enthusiastic Virtual Assistant to support our two Premier Martial Arts locations. This is a fantastic opportunity for a motivated individual to grow with our company, starting part-time with the potential to transition to a full-time position. If you're a problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced environment and are excited about the positive impact of martial arts, we want to hear from you!



About Us:

At Premier Martial Arts, we're more than just a martial arts studio – we're a community dedicated to building confidence, discipline, and respect. We empower individuals of all ages to achieve their full potential through the transformative power of martial arts. We empower individuals of all ages, from toddlers to adults, to achieve their full potential through the transformative power of Martial Arts. Our experienced instructors provide personalized instruction in a supportive and challenging environment, fostering not only physical fitness but also mental strength and character development. We believe that martial arts is a journey of self-discovery, and we're committed to guiding our students every step of the way. We're proud to be a part of our local communities and to have a positive impact on the lives of our students.



About the Role:

As our Virtual Assistant, you will play a crucial role in the smooth operation of our studios and contribute directly to our growth. You will be responsible for a variety of tasks, including:



Appointment Setting: Managing class schedules, booking trial lessons, and handling appointment confirmations.



Sales Follow-Up: Following up with leads, nurturing potential students, and converting inquiries into memberships.



Outbound Sales Reach: Proactively reaching out to potential students through various channels (e.g.,
, social media, community outreach) to generate new leads.



General Customer Service: Providing exceptional customer service to current and prospective students, answering inquiries, and resolving issues promptly and professionally.



Account Management: Maintaining student records, tracking memberships, and managing billing information.



Administrative Tasks: Handling various administrative duties, such as data entry,
 management, and preparing reports.



Digital Marketing: As you grow with the role, you may have the opportunity to contribute to our digital marketing efforts, including social media management, content creation, and online advertising.



Qualifications:

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Proven ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.

Proactive and self-motivated with a strong work ethic.

Problem-solving skills and a positive attitude.

Experience in customer service or sales is a plus.

Familiarity with martial arts or a passion for fitness is a plus.

Ability to work during our business hours in America with some flexibility.

Experience with CRM software is a plus.

Experience with Digital Marketing, social media marketing etc., is a plus but not required



Benefits:

Opportunity to work with a growing and dynamic organization.

Potential for advancement and increased responsibility.

Be part of a team that is making a positive impact on the community.

Opportunity for growth (part-time to start, with the potential to become full-time).



To Apply:

Please fill out this Google form and answer the questions to apply!






Thank you so much and we are ready for you to start your martial arts journey!

Maintain and update the 
 WordPress website

Baseball statistics

About DownUnder Travellers

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller For Long Term High Commission Role
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center. We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: Virtual Assistant – Director Support (Long-Term Role)
description:
We are an established Australian building company seeking a highly organised, proactive Virtual Assistant to support a fast-paced Director with administration, inbox and calendar management

Your primary role is to protect the Director’s time, ensure nothing slips through the cracks, and bring structure and organisation to a growing business.

Key Responsibilities

Daily

- Categorise and respond to
s on behalf of the Director

- Manage calendar (batch meetings, confirm details, remove downtime gaps)

- Schedule and confirm client meetings, supplier reps, quoting appointments, and personal commitments

- Draft
s, organise orders, book meetings from voice notes from the director

Requirements

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert + Content Production Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled GoHighLevel expert who can also support content production for our fast-growing marketing operations. This role is perfect for someone who understands funnels, automation, and workflows — and can help execute high-quality content and marketing assets.

Responsibilities

GoHighLevel (GHL) Tasks

Build and optimize funnels, landing pages, and automation workflows

Set up pipelines, calendars, triggers, forms, and integrations

Manage CRM, tagging, segmentation, and lead nurturing sequences

Troubleshoot technical issues and ensure smooth system performance

Support onboarding setups inside GHL for new clients or campaigns

Content Production Tasks

Assist in creating marketing assets (graphics, video snippets, social media content)

Organize content in GHL or related tools

Prepare simple visuals or layouts for campaigns (we provide templates & guidance)

Basic editing for short-form content is a plus

Maintain organized asset libraries and versioning

How We Want You to Manage the Process & Flow

We need someone who can take ownership of the workflow and keep operations running smoothly:

1. Follow and Improve SOPs

Execute tasks based on clear step-by-step processes

Suggest improvements when needed

Keep everything organized in GHL, Google Drive, trackers, etc.

2. Maintain a Smooth Production Pipeline

Manage tasks in order: planning ? creation ? approval ? publishing

Update statuses clearly and consistently

Coordinate with the team for missing materials or approvals

3. Be Proactive, Not Reactive

Anticipate next steps in funnels and campaigns

Raise issues early

Stay ahead of deadlines

4. Communicate Clearly

Provide daily/weekly updates

Ask clarifying questions early

Use clean naming conventions and file organization

5. Quality Control

Double-check work before submitting

Ensure funnels, automations, and content look polished

Avoid errors, broken flows, or missed triggers

6. Manage Multiple Tasks With Structure

Prioritize tasks properly

Break down big tasks into smaller steps

Keep the workflow moving even during busy weeks

title: STATIC IMAGE DESIGNER
description:
Before you apply, read every word.

We're a fast-scaling brand.

We run paid ads across multiple markets.

And we need a Static Image Designer who understands one thing:

Pretty doesn't sell. Designed-to-convert does.

If you make things that look nice but don't think about the hook, the copy placement, the thumb-stop 
nt, this isn't for you.

What the job is:

You receive a brief (avatar, angle, copy). You deliver a high-converting static ad image. Clean. Bold. Built for Meta feeds.

What we need:

? Strong eye for direct response design (hierarchy, contrast, emotion)

? AI tools fluency is mandatory, Midjourney, Firefly, Canva AI, or whatever you use. We don't care which. But you must use them actively and show us how.

? Able to work fast, turnaround matters

? Available for recurring weekly work

You're NOT a fit if:

? Your portfolio is logos and branding decks

? You've never designed a paid ad before

? You don't use AI in your design process

? You send a generic application



The Hiring Process:



Trial Task: We send you a brief. You deliver 1 static ad concept within 24h. Unpaid. Shows us your speed, thinking, and output quality.

Paid Project Trial: Real campaign asset. If it performs, we move forward.

One-Month Paid Trial: Weekly deliverables with feedback loops.

Long-Term Offer: Consistent performers join the core team.





HOW TO APPLY

We will ignore any message that doesn't follow this structure exactly.

No intro paragraphs. No PDFs. No "please find attached." Just this:



1. Full Name:

2. Age:

3. Country / City:

4. Years of experience in ad/performance design:

5. AI tools you actively use (be specific, name them and how you use them):

6. Link to 2-3 static ad examples from past work (not general portfolio, ad creatives only):

7. One sentence: what makes your ads actually convert?

8. Loom Video or a voice record (introduce yourself, walk us through one of your past ad designs and explain the decisions you made):



Apply with that exact format.

Wrong format = ignored.

Right format = you hear from us within 48 hours.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: Appraisal Support Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant to support a growing real estate appraisal business. The role focuses on administrative support, scheduling, data entry, and assisting with appraisal report preparation.



This position is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with structured data and real estate information.



Experience with appraisal software such as Total by a la mode is helpful but not required. Training will be provided.



Work Schedule & Compensation

My business operates in the U.S. Central Time Zone.



Some work can be completed outside my working hours, but you must be available most weekdays during Central Time business hours for communication and coordination.



This position is salary-based at $1,000 per month.



The role is expected to take approximately 40 hours per week once training is complete.



If workload consistently exceeds 50 hours per week, I will consider hiring an additional support person unless you prefer the additional hours.



If business is slow or we stop work early on certain days, your pay will not be reduced.



Expected Production

The expected production level is approximately:



40–50 appraisal reports per month



Currently the business averages 30–35 reports per month.



The purpose of this role is to free up my time so I can focus on growing the business and increasing report volume.



Success Metrics



Your performance will be evaluated based on:

Accuracy

Reports must be entered carefully and correctly.



Communication

You should regularly communicate:



• what has been completed

• what still needs to be done

• any questions or issues



Client Responsiveness



Clients should not need to follow up repeatedly for updates regarding:



• inspection scheduling

• report status

• revisions



Business Growth

A major measure of success will be whether freeing up my time allows the business to increase the number of appraisal assignments completed.



Additional Responsibilities

In addition to my appraisal business, I also operate a real estate sales business.



After you become efficient with appraisal tasks, I may occasionally ask for help with real estate transaction tasks as well.



Application Questions:



To apply for this position, please answer the questions below in your application message. Applications that do not answer all questions will not be reviewed.



1. Experience

Which best describes your experience?



A) I have used Total by a la mode for appraisal reports

B) I have worked in real estate but not with appraisal software

C) I have Virtual Assistant or administrative experience

D) None of the above but I am willing to learn



If you selected A, briefly describe the tasks you performed inside Total.



2. Inspection Scheduling Message

Write a short message to a homeowner requesting to schedule an appraisal inspection.



The message should:



• introduce yourself as the appraiser's assistant

• explain why you are contacting them

• ask for their availability to schedule the inspection



Keep the message professional and concise.



3. Client Update

Write an
 to a client explaining:



• the inspection is scheduled for Friday at 10:00 AM

• the appraisal report will be delivered within 48 hours after the inspection



4. Client Instructions Message

A private client has hired the appraiser and must complete two steps before the appraisal can begin:



• sign the engagement letter

• submit payment



Write a message explaining the next steps clearly and professionally.



5. Morning Update Message

Imagine you are sending me a message at the start of the workday.



Write a short update explaining:



• what appraisal reports are currently in progress

• what tasks need my attention today

• anything that has changed or needs a decision



6. End-of-Day Update

Write a short message summarizing the end of the workday.



Include:



• what was completed

• what is still in progress

• any issues or items that need follow-up tomorrow



7. Organization Test

Imagine we currently have 5 appraisal reports in progress.



Two inspections are scheduled today.

One report needs revisions from the lender.

Two reports still need to be written.



Explain how you would organize and track these tasks so nothing gets missed.



8. Problem Solving

If you are preparing part of an appraisal report and notice information that might be incorrect, what would you do?



9. Attention to Detail

Describe three tasks from previous work where accuracy and attention to detail were very important.



10. Work Availability

Please answer honestly:



Are you currently working for other clients?



If yes, how many hours per week?



Are you available during U.S. Central Time business hours for communication?



Final Instruction

At the end of your application include the word:



Valuation



Applications that do not include this word will not be reviewed.

We are hiring a senior E-commerce Manager to own and manage the majority of our digital business. This role is ideal for someone with a strong small business background who is comfortable leading a lean team, managing day to day operations, and stepping into the details when needed.



This is a hands on leadership role. We are not looking for a high level executive who operates far from execution. We are looking for someone who can lead, manage, and do.



For more details about this opening, we would like to direct you to our recruitment platform: Talent Meets AI

nt to create an account, setup your profile to at least 85% and complete your application?

title: Shopify Product Content & SEO Specialist (Contract)
description:
REPOST: Please Apply Again if Interested. *** Eight Week Project Role with Potential Ongoing Position ***

_____________________________________________________________________



OVERVIEW:

We are seeking a highly detail focused contractor to review and optimise approximately 800 existing Shopify product listings. This is a defined eight week project focused on improving the quality, clarity and SEO performance of existing product pages.



If the project goes well, the working relationship is strong, AND YOU HAVE ADDITIONAL SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE, there may be an opportunity to transition into an ongoing, full-time Marketing & Growth Operations role supporting wider ecommerce and mulit-business marketing activities.



The immediate focus of this role is methodical catalogue optimisation and product page improvement and is a MUST for skillset for successful applicants. 

_____________________________________________________________________



PROJECT SCOPE:

You will work through an existing Shopify catalogue and improve each listing according to an established structure and brand guide. Key tasks include:



• Reviewing product descriptions for clarity, accuracy and logical flow

• Understanding the purpose of each product and correcting inconsistencies

• Adjusting summary information and selecting three key callouts

• Tightening AI generated bullet points and removing repetition or contradictions

• Ensuring formatting consistency across headings, bullets and layout

• Adding internal links where appropriate

• Conducting keyword research relevant to each product

• Adding three SEO FAQs per product

• Checking product images are correct and properly optimised

• Confirming product handles follow naming conventions

• Reviewing and optimising Meta Title and Meta Description

• Validating product information against supplier websites

• Reviewing and optimising collection pages for keyword alignment and internal linking

• Reviewing and optimising legacy blog articles for keyword alignment and internal linking



This role requires someone who can work methodically through a large catalogue while maintaining a high level of attention to detail. There is a project completion bonus of ?12,000 for the successful execution of this task within the agreed timeframe and to the quality standards required.

_____________________________________________________________________



IDEAL EXPERIENCE:

You will be working within an established structure and brand voice and attention to detail is critical and a desire to understand the products and why we are optimising, not just use AI to dump words into the pages.  



• Strong experience with Shopify product management

• Solid understanding of on page SEO 

• Confident conducting keyword research (strategically & tactically)

• Excellent written English

• High attention to detail

• Reliable, methodical and able to work through a defined product list

• Willing to ask questions, push back and seek clarity vs "just doing"

• Good work ethic - no juggling multiple clients / projects

• Motivated to contribute and help a small business grow

• Able to work full
 hours in Australian Time Zone for 8 weeks

_____________________________________________________________________



POTENTIAL FUTURE ROLE:

This short-term gig is a project based catalogue clean up. Because it requires developing a strong understanding of the products we sell, the person who performs well on this project may be a strong candidate for the ongoing role we are hiring for: Marketing & Growth Operations Co-Ordinator.



However, this project represents only one component of the broader role. Appointment to the ongoing position would depend on demonstrating the wider marketing and operational capabilities required. Tasks for the ongoing role:



• eCommerce Product Management inc. on page SEO, new product load

• High-quality content research and writing for social, web and collateral

• Social media content posting and social paid ads management

• Maintaining digital assets and documentation management

• Off-page and local SEO using only white hat techniques

• Assisting with the rollout of marketing initiatives and new business projects

• Converting ideas and notes into structured documents, presentations and marketing materials

• Supporting marketing and growth activities as required across multiple ventures



Please note, this ongoing role would be a full-time, WFH on Australian hours / day shift, hired via an EoR with full benefits and has an expected annual salary including allowances, 13th month etc of approx: ?60,000 before taxes and deductions. 

_____________________________________________________________________



ABOUT THE BUSINESS:

You will be working directly alongside a female founder who runs a number of businesses, and consults to other companies in the area of marketing, franchising and technology. The business has an established team of 5, covering, operations, sales, finance and graphic design, with two staff residing in Cebu. The businesses are in a high growth phase and you would be part of a positive and high performing team. 

_____________________________________________________________________



TO APPLY:

Please share your resume and cover letter explaining your experience, and links to 3 x shopify sites you have managed. Please include the letters OFC in your application. A short video introducing yourself will be highly regarded. If you are intersted in the ongoing role also, please also explain your skills and experience for these additional tasks. Please advise us if you are based in Cebu, as applicants from this area will be highly regarded for the ongoing position to align with team events and training.
